---
title: "Data cleaning for SwissPedGrowth"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-23"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Introduction

This script is to clean anthropometric data from hospitals and primary care providers of SwissPedGrowth project, a nested project of SwissPedHealth.

I will apply the following inclusion criteria for SwissPedGrowth at the end of the data cleaning:

Include participants who
- visited a hospital between 25.12.2016 and 07.01.2024 (adapted period for date shifts) based on Administrative Case AND
- were between 0 to 20 years old at visit based on Administrative Case admission

Exclude participants
- with refused GC
- missing birth date

Include data collected between 25.12.2016 and 07.01.2024 (adapted period for date shifts).

# Set up

## Software


```{r, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}

library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(gtsummary)
library(growthcleanr)
library(data.table)
library(readxl)
library(lubridate)

```


## Import data

Hospital data 2024.2

```{r}

# administrative
data_participant_sphn2024.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "SubjectPseudoIdentifier_sphn2024.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))
data_sex_sphn2024.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "AdministrativeSex_sphn2024.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))
data_case_sphn2024.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "AdministrativeCase_sphn2024.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))
data_consent_sphn2024.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "Consent_sphn2024.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("", ".", "NA"))
data_home_sphn2024.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "old_sphn2024.2", "HomeAddress_sphn2024.2_29-09-2025.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))


# anthropometric
data_height_sphn2024.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "BodyHeightMeasurement_sphn2024.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))
data_weight_sphn2024.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "BodyWeightMeasurement_sphn2024.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))

```


Hospital data 2025.2

```{r, message = FALSE}
# administrative
data_participant_sphn2025.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "SubjectPseudoIdentifier_sphn2025.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))
data_birth_sphn2025.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "Birth_sphn2025.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))
data_sex_sphn2025.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "AdministrativeSex_sphn2025.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))
data_case_sphn2025.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "AdministrativeCase_sphn2025.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))
data_encounter_sphn2025.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "HealthcareEncounter_sphn2025.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))
data_consent_sphn2025.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "Consent_sphn2025.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("", ".", "NA"))
data_home_sphn2025.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "HomeAddress_sphn2025.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))
data_nationality_sphn2025.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "Nationality_sphn2025.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))


# clinical
data_billed_diagnosis_sphn2025.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "BilledDiagnosis_sphn2025.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))
data_diagnosis_sphn2025.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "Diagnosis_sphn2025.2_10-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))

# anthropometric
data_height_sphn2025.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "BodyHeightMeasurement_sphn2025.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))
data_weight_sphn2025.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "BodyWeightMeasurement_sphn2025.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))
data_circumference_sphn2025.2 <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "CircumferenceMeasurement_sphn2025.2_07-02-2026.csv"), na.strings=c("",".","NA"))
```

External data

```{r, message = FALSE}

# growth references
interpolated_braegger_height <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "Interpolated-growth-references", "interpolated_braegger_height.csv"))
interpolated_braegger_weight <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "Interpolated-growth-references", "interpolated_braegger_weight.csv"))
braegger_length <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "Interpolated-growth-references", "braegger_length.csv"))
interpolated_braegger_head_circumference <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "Interpolated-growth-references", "interpolated_braegger_head_circumference.csv"))
interpolated_braegger_bmi <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "Interpolated-growth-references", "interpolated_braegger_bmi.csv"))

# countries
data_countries <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "Countries", "Country-codes.csv"))

```


# Participants

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_participant <- data_participant_sphn2025.2 |> 
  bind_rows(data_participant_sphn2024.2)

data_participant <- data_participant |> 
  rename("participant_id" = "Identifier",
         "hospital" = "DataProvider_InstitutionCode_Name") |> 
  select(hospital, participant_id)

data_participant |> distinct(participant_id) |> nrow()

```

### Birth date

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_birth <- data_birth_sphn2025.2

data_birth <- data_birth |> 
  rename("participant_id" = "SubjectPseudoIdentifier_Identifier",
         "birth_day" = "Day",
         "birth_month" = "Month",
         "birth_year" = "Year",
         "delivery_mode" = "DeliveryModeCode") |> 
  mutate(birth_date = dmy(paste0(birth_day, birth_month, birth_year))) |> 
  mutate(birth_date = case_when(is.na(birth_date) & birth_day == "---29" & birth_month == "--02" ~ dmy(paste0("--28", birth_month, birth_year)),
                   TRUE ~ birth_date)) |> 
  mutate(gestational_age_weeks = case_when(GestationalAge_Quantity_Unit == "d" ~ GestationalAge_Quantity_Value/7,
                                           GestationalAge_Quantity_Unit == "wk" ~ GestationalAge_Quantity_Value)) |> 
  group_by(participant_id) |>
  arrange(birth_date, gestational_age_weeks, delivery_mode) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(participant_id, birth_date, gestational_age_weeks, delivery_mode)

# check birth_date

data_birth |> distinct(participant_id) |> nrow()

```

### Sex

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_sex <- data_sex_sphn2025.2 |> 
  bind_rows(data_sex_sphn2024.2)


data_sex <- data_sex |> 
  rename("participant_id" = "SubjectPseudoIdentifier_Identifier") |> 
  mutate(sex = factor(Code, levels = c("Male", "Female"))) |> 
  select(participant_id, sex)

data_sex |> distinct(participant_id) |> nrow()


```

### Consent

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_consent <- data_consent_sphn2025.2 |> 
  bind_rows(data_consent_sphn2024.2)

data_consent <- data_consent |> 
  rename("participant_id" = "SubjectPseudoIdentifier_Identifier",
         "consent_type" = "TypeCode_Label",
         "consent_status" = "StatusCode_Label") |> 
  filter(consent_type == "Generalized") |>
  select(participant_id, consent_type, consent_status)

#check consent

data_consent |> distinct(participant_id) |> nrow()

```

### Nationality

```{r}

data_nationality <- data_nationality_sphn2025.2

data_nationality <- data_nationality |> 
  rename("participant_id" = "SubjectPseudoIdentifier_Identifier",
         "nationality" = "AssociatedCountry_Code_Label") |> 
  mutate(nationality = case_when(nationality == "Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela" ~ "Venezuela (Bolivarian Republic of)",
                                  nationality == "Bolivia" ~ "Bolivia (Plurinational State of)",
                                  nationality == "Bosnia - Herzegovnia" ~ "Bosnia and Herzegovina",
                                 nationality == "Commonwealth of Dominica" ~ "Dominica",
                                  nationality == "Cote d'Ivoire" ~ "Côte d'Ivoire",
                                  nationality == "Czech republic" ~ "Czechia",
                                  nationality == "Democratic Republic of the Congo" ~ "Congo, Democratic Republic of the",
                                 nationality == "Democratic People's Republic of Korea" ~ "Korea (Democratic People's Republic of)",
                                 nationality == "England" ~ "United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland",
                                  nationality == "Great Britain" ~ "United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland",
                                  nationality == "Islamic Republic of Iran" ~ "Iran (Islamic Republic of)",
                                  nationality == "Island in region of Cabo Verde" ~ "Cabo Verde",
                                  nationality == "Laos" ~ "Lao People's Democratic Republic",
                                  nationality == "Republic of Moldova" ~ "Moldova, Republic of",
                                  nationality == "Republic of Serbia" ~ "Serbia",
                                  nationality == "Republic of the Congo" ~ "Congo",
                                 nationality == "Republic of the Philippines" ~ "Philippines",
                                  nationality == "Reunion" ~ "Réunion",
                                  nationality == "South Korea" ~ "Korea, Republic of",
                                  nationality == "Taiwan" ~ "Taiwan, Province of China",
                                  nationality == "Tanzania" ~ "Tanzania, United Republic of",
                                  nationality == "The Bahamas" ~ "Bahamas",
                                  nationality == "The Gambia" ~ "Gambia",
                                  nationality == "Türkiye" ~ "Turkey",
                                  nationality == "Reunion" ~ "Réunion",
                                  nationality == "Reunion" ~ "Réunion",
                                  nationality == "Reunion" ~ "Réunion",
                                 nationality == "Solomon islands"  ~ "Solomon Islands",
                                 nationality == "Country" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ nationality)) |> 
  select(participant_id, nationality)

data_countries <- data_countries |> 
  rename("country" = "name",
         "subregion" = "sub.region") |> 
  mutate(continent_residence = region,
         subcontinent_residence = subregion,
         continent_nationality = region,
         subcontinent_nationality = subregion) |> 
  select(country, continent_residence, subcontinent_residence, continent_nationality, subcontinent_nationality) |> 
  bind_rows(data.frame(country = c("West European country", "East European country"), continent_residence = c("Europe", "Europe"), subcontinent_residence = c("Western Europe", "Eastern Europe"), continent_nationality = c("Europe", "Europe"), subcontinent_nationality = c("Western Europe", "Eastern Europe")))

data_nationality <- data_nationality |> 
  left_join(data_countries |> select(continent_nationality, subcontinent_nationality, country) , by = c("nationality" = "country"))

data_nationality |> distinct(participant_id) |> nrow()

```

### Residence & Swiss-SEP

```{r}

data_home_sphn2024.2 <- data_home_sphn2024.2 |> 
  filter(DataProvider_InstitutionCode_Name == "HUG")

data_home_sphn2025.2 <- data_home_sphn2025.2 |> 
  filter(DataProvider_InstitutionCode_Name != "HUG" )

data_home <- data_home_sphn2024.2 |>
  bind_rows(data_home_sphn2025.2)


data_home <- data_home |> 
  rename("participant_id" = "SubjectPseudoIdentifier_Identifier",
         "country_residence" = "Country_Code_Label",
         "swiss_sep_version" = "SwissSocioEconomicPosition_Version",
         "swiss_sep_value" = "SwissSocioEconomicPosition_Value",
         "distance_residence_sep" = "SwissSocioEconomicPosition_Distance_Value") |> 
  mutate(swiss_sep_version = case_when(swiss_sep_version == "Swiss-SEP version 1.0" | swiss_sep_version == "1" | swiss_sep_version == "Version 1.0" | swiss_sep_version == "1.0" ~ "swiss_sep_1",
                                       swiss_sep_version == "Swiss-SEP version 2.0" | swiss_sep_version == "2" | swiss_sep_version == "Version 2.0" | swiss_sep_version == "2.0" ~ "swiss_sep_2",
                                       swiss_sep_version == "Swiss-SEP version 3.0" | swiss_sep_version == "3" | swiss_sep_version == "Version 3.0" | swiss_sep_version == "3.0" ~ "swiss_sep_3")) |> 
  mutate(country_residence = case_when(country_residence == "Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela" ~ "Venezuela (Bolivarian Republic of)",
                                  country_residence == "Bolivia" ~ "Bolivia (Plurinational State of)",
                                  country_residence == "Bosnia - Herzegovnia" ~ "Bosnia and Herzegovina",
                                  country_residence == "Commonwealth of Dominica" ~ "Dominica",
                                  country_residence == "Cote d'Ivoire" ~ "Côte d'Ivoire",
                                  country_residence == "Czech republic" ~ "Czechia",
                                  country_residence == "Democratic Republic of the Congo" ~ "Congo, Democratic Republic of the",
                                  country_residence == "Democratic People's Republic of Korea" ~ "Korea (Democratic People's Republic of)",
                                  country_residence == "England" ~ "United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland",
                                  country_residence == "Islamic Republic of Iran" ~ "Iran (Islamic Republic of)",
                                  country_residence == "Island in region of Cabo Verde" ~ "Cabo Verde",
                                  country_residence == "Great Britain" ~ "United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland",
                                  country_residence == "Laos" ~ "Lao People's Democratic Republic",
                                  country_residence == "Republic of Moldova" ~ "Moldova, Republic of",
                                  country_residence == "Republic of Serbia" ~ "Serbia",
                                  country_residence == "Republic of the Congo" ~ "Congo",
                                  country_residence == "Republic of the Philippines" ~ "Philippines",
                                  country_residence == "Reunion" ~ "Réunion",
                                  country_residence == "South Korea" ~ "Korea, Republic of",
                                  country_residence == "Taiwan" ~ "Taiwan, Province of China",
                                  country_residence == "Tanzania" ~ "Tanzania, United Republic of",
                                  country_residence == "The Bahamas" ~ "Bahamas",
                                  country_residence == "The Gambia" ~ "Gambia",
                                  country_residence == "Türkiye" ~ "Turkey",
                                  country_residence == "Reunion" ~ "Réunion",
                                  country_residence == "Reunion" ~ "Réunion",
                                  country_residence == "Reunion" ~ "Réunion",
                                 country_residence == "Solomon islands"  ~ "Solomon Islands",
                                 country_residence == "Country" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ country_residence)) |> 
  select(participant_id, country_residence, swiss_sep_value, swiss_sep_version, distance_residence_sep) |> 
  group_by(participant_id, swiss_sep_version) |>
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = "swiss_sep_version", values_from = swiss_sep_value) |> 
  select(participant_id, country_residence, swiss_sep_1, swiss_sep_2, swiss_sep_3, distance_residence_sep)



data_home <- data_home |> 
  left_join(data_countries |> select(country, continent_residence, subcontinent_residence), by = c("country_residence" = "country"), na_matches = "never")

data_home |> distinct(participant_id) |> nrow()

```

### Join participant information

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_participant <- data_participant |> 
  left_join(data_birth, by = c("participant_id"), na_matches = "never") |> 
  left_join(data_sex, by = c("participant_id"), na_matches = "never") |> 
  left_join(data_consent, by = c("participant_id"), na_matches = "never") |> 
  left_join(data_home, by = c("participant_id"), na_matches = "never") |> 
  left_join(data_nationality, by = c("participant_id"), na_matches = "never")

  
```

Check participants

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_participant |> 
  select(hospital, participant_id, sex, birth_date, gestational_age_weeks, delivery_mode, consent_type, consent_status, country_residence, swiss_sep_1, distance_residence_sep, nationality) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = "hospital",
              type = c("participant_id", "country_residence", "nationality") ~ "continuous2",
              statistic = list(
                all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({min}, {max})",
                all_continuous2() ~ "{N_obs}"
                ),
              missing = "always",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)") |> 
  add_overall()

cat("number of participant id's:", data_participant |> nrow(), "\n")
cat("number of distinct participant id's:", data_participant |> distinct(participant_id) |>  nrow(), "\n")

```


# Administrative data

### Cases

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_case <- data_case_sphn2025.2 |> 
  group_by(AdministrativeCase) |> 
  arrange(ymd_hms(AdmissionDateTime), .group_by = TRUE) |> 
  arrange(desc(ymd_hms(DischargeDateTime)), .group_by = TRUE) |>
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup()


data_case <- data_case |> 
  bind_rows(data_case_sphn2024.2)

data_case <- data_case |> 
  rename("participant_id" = "SubjectPseudoIdentifier_Identifier") |> 
  left_join(data_participant, by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never") |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(Identifier) ~ str_extract(AdministrativeCase, "(?<=AdministrativeCase-).*"),
         TRUE ~ Identifier)) |> 
  mutate(case_carehandling = factor(CareHandling)) |>
  mutate(case_admission_datetime = ymd_hms(AdmissionDateTime),
         case_discharge_datetime = ymd_hms(DischargeDateTime),
         case_duration_hours = as.numeric(difftime(case_discharge_datetime, case_admission_datetime, units = "hours")),
         case_duration_days = as.numeric(difftime(case_discharge_datetime, case_admission_datetime, units = "days"))) |> 
  mutate(age_days_case_admission = as.numeric(difftime(case_admission_datetime, birth_date, units = "days")),
         age_years_case_admission = age_days_case_admission/365.25,
         age_days_case_discharge = as.numeric(difftime(case_discharge_datetime, birth_date, units = "days")),
         age_years_case_discharge = age_days_case_discharge/365.25) |> 
  select(hospital, participant_id, sex, birth_date, gestational_age_weeks, delivery_mode, consent_type, consent_status, country_residence, swiss_sep_3, distance_residence_sep, nationality, case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge)

data_case |> distinct(case_id) |> nrow()

```


Check cases

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_case |> 
  select(hospital, participant_id, sex, case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = "hospital",
              type = c("participant_id", "case_id") ~ "continuous2",
              statistic = list(
                all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({min}, {max})",
                all_continuous2() ~ "{N_obs}"
                ),
              missing = "always",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)") |> 
  add_overall()

cat("number of case id's:", data_case |> nrow(), "\n")
cat("number of distinct case id's:", data_case |> distinct(case_id) |>  nrow(), "\n")

```

### Healthcare Encounters


```{r, message = FALSE}

data_encounter <- data_encounter_sphn2025.2

data_encounter <- data_encounter |> 
  rename("participant_id" = "SubjectPseudoIdentifier_Identifier") |> 
  left_join(data_participant, by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never") |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(AdministrativeCase_Identifier) ~ str_extract(AdministrativeCase, "(?<=AdministrativeCase-).*"),
                             TRUE ~ AdministrativeCase_Identifier)) |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never") |> 
  mutate(encounter_id = case_when(hospital == "Luzerner Kantonsspital AG" ~ str_extract(HealthcareEncounter, "(?<=HealthcareEncounter-).*"),
                                  TRUE ~ Identifier)) |> 
  rename("encounter_origin_location_name" = "OriginLocation_Exact",
         "encounter_origin_location_code" = "OriginLocation_TypeCode_Label",
         "encounter_current_location_name" = "CurrentLocation_Exact",
         "encounter_current_location_code" = "CurrentLocation_TypeCode_Label",
         "encounter_target_location_name" = "TargetLocation_Exact",
         "encounter_target_location_code" = "TargetLocation_TypeCode_Label",
         "encounter_specialty" = "TherapeuticArea_SpecialtyName_Label") |> 
  mutate(encounter_start_datetime = ymd_hms(StartDateTime),
         encounter_end_datetime = ymd_hms(EndDateTime),
         encounter_duration_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(encounter_end_datetime, encounter_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         encounter_duration_hours = as.numeric(difftime(encounter_end_datetime, encounter_start_datetime, units = "hours")),
         encounter_duration_days = as.numeric(difftime(encounter_end_datetime, encounter_start_datetime, units = "days")),
         age_days_encounter_start = as.numeric(difftime(encounter_start_datetime, birth_date, units = "days")),
         age_years_encounter_start = age_days_encounter_start/365.25,
         age_days_encounter_end = as.numeric(difftime(encounter_end_datetime, birth_date, units = "days")),
         age_years_encounter_end = age_days_encounter_end/365.25) |> 
  select(hospital, participant_id, sex, birth_date, gestational_age_weeks, delivery_mode, consent_type, consent_status, country_residence, swiss_sep_3, distance_residence_sep, nationality, case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge, encounter_id, Identifier, encounter_specialty, encounter_origin_location_name, encounter_origin_location_code, encounter_current_location_name, encounter_current_location_code, encounter_target_location_name, encounter_target_location_code, encounter_start_datetime, encounter_end_datetime, encounter_duration_minutes,  encounter_duration_hours, encounter_duration_days, age_days_encounter_start, age_years_encounter_start, age_days_encounter_end, age_years_encounter_end)


data_encounter <- data_encounter |> 
  group_by(encounter_id) |> 
  arrange(encounter_specialty, encounter_origin_location_code, encounter_origin_location_name, encounter_current_location_code, encounter_current_location_name, encounter_target_location_code, encounter_target_location_name) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup()

```



Create encounter_carehandling

```{r}

data_encounter <- data_encounter |>
  mutate(encounter_carehandling = case_when(hospital == "CHUV" &
                                              (encounter_current_location_code == "Notfall-/Rettungsdienste" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_code == "Pediatric Accident and Emergency department")
                                            ~ "ER encounter",
                                            hospital == "CHUV" &
                                              (case_carehandling == "Outpatient procedure" |
                                                 case_carehandling == "Provision of day care")
                                            ~ "Outpatient encounter",
                                            hospital == "CHUV" &
                                              (case_carehandling == "Inpatient care")
                                            ~ "Inpatient encounter",
                                            
                                            hospital == "HUG" & 
                                              (encounter_current_location_code == "Free-standing emergency care center" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_code == "Hospital-based outpatient emergency care center" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_code == "Notfall-/Rettungsdienste" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_code == "Pediatric Accident and Emergency department")
                                            ~ "ER encounter",
                                            hospital == "HUG" &
                                              (case_carehandling == "Outpatient procedure" |
                                              case_carehandling == "Provision of day care")
                                            ~ "Outpatient encounter",
                                            hospital == "HUG" &
                                              case_carehandling == "Inpatient care"
                                            ~ "Inpatient encounter",
                                            
                                            hospital == "Insel Gruppe AG" &
                                              (encounter_current_location_name == "Gynäkologie Notfall" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_name == "Notfall Ambi UKN Fasttrack" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_name == "Notfall Erwachsene" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_name == "Notfall Kinder und Jugendliche" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_name == "Notfallstation Chirurgie" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_name == "Notfallstation Erwachsene" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_name == "Notfallstation Kinder Jugend" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_name == "Notfallstation Medizin")
                                            ~ "ER encounter",
                                            hospital == "Insel Gruppe AG" &
                                              (case_carehandling == "Outpatient procedure" |
                                                 case_carehandling == "Provision of day care")
                                            ~ "Outpatient encounter",
                                            hospital == "Insel Gruppe AG" &
                                              case_carehandling == "Inpatient care"
                                            ~ "Inpatient encounter",
                                            
                                            hospital == "Luzerner Kantonsspital AG" &
                                              encounter_current_location_code == "Pediatric Accident and Emergency department"
                                            ~ "ER encounter",
                                            hospital == "Luzerner Kantonsspital AG" &
                                              (case_carehandling == "Outpatient procedure" |
                                                 case_carehandling == "Provision of day care")
                                            ~ "Outpatient encounter", 
                                            hospital == "Luzerner Kantonsspital AG" &
                                              case_carehandling == "Inpatient care"
                                            ~ "Inpatient encounter",
                                            hospital == "Luzerner Kantonsspital AG" &
                                              (encounter_current_location_code == "Hospital-based outpatient pediatric clinic")
                                            ~ "Outpatient encounter",
                                            hospital == "Luzerner Kantonsspital AG" &
                                              (encounter_current_location_code == "Inpatient acute care environment" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_code == "Operating room" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_code == "Pediatric intensive care unit" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_code == "Pediatric medicine department" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_code == "Pediatric surgical department")
                                            ~ "Inpatient encounter",
                                            
                                            hospital == "Universitäts-Kinderspital Zürich - Eleonorenstiftung" &
                                              encounter_current_location_code == "Notfall-/Rettungsdienste"
                                            ~ "ER encounter",
                                            hospital == "Universitäts-Kinderspital Zürich - Eleonorenstiftung" &
                                              (case_carehandling == "Outpatient procedure" |
                                                 case_carehandling == "Provision of day care")
                                            ~ "Outpatient encounter",
                                            hospital == "Universitäts-Kinderspital Zürich - Eleonorenstiftung" &
                                              case_carehandling == "Inpatient care"
                                            ~ "Inpatient encounter",
                                            hospital == "Universitäts-Kinderspital Zürich - Eleonorenstiftung" &
                                              encounter_current_location_code == "Outpatient environment"
                                            ~ "Outpatient encounter",
                                            
                                            hospital == "University Children Hospital Basel" &
                                              (encounter_current_location_name == "Pädiatrie_Notfall Pädiatrie" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_name == "Pädiatrie_Notfallpraxis Hausärzte" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_name == "Orthopädie_Notfall Pädiatrie" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_name == "Chirurgie_Notfall Chirurgie" |
                                                 encounter_current_location_name == "Chirurgie_Notfall Pädiatrie")
                                            ~ "ER encounter",
                                            hospital == "University Children Hospital Basel" &
                                              (case_carehandling == "Outpatient procedure" |
                                                 case_carehandling == "Provision of day care")
                                            ~ "Outpatient encounter",
                                            hospital == "University Children Hospital Basel" &
                                              case_carehandling == "Inpatient care"
                                            ~ "Inpatient encounter"))

```


Check encounters

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_encounter |> 
  select(hospital, participant_id, sex, case_id, case_admission_datetime, encounter_id, encounter_carehandling, encounter_specialty, encounter_origin_location_name, encounter_origin_location_code, encounter_current_location_name, encounter_current_location_code, encounter_target_location_name, encounter_target_location_code, encounter_start_datetime, encounter_end_datetime, encounter_duration_minutes,  encounter_duration_hours, encounter_duration_days, age_days_encounter_start, age_years_encounter_start, age_days_encounter_end, age_years_encounter_end) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = "hospital",
              type = c("participant_id", "case_id", "encounter_id", "encounter_specialty", "encounter_origin_location_name", "encounter_origin_location_code", "encounter_current_location_name", "encounter_current_location_code", "encounter_target_location_name", "encounter_target_location_code") ~ "continuous2",
              statistic = list(
                all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({min}, {max})",
                all_continuous2() ~ "{N_obs}"
                ),
              missing = "always",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)") |> 
  add_overall()

cat("number of encounter id's:", data_encounter |> nrow(), "\n")
cat("number of distinct encounter id's:", data_encounter |> distinct(encounter_id) |>  nrow(), "\n")


data_encounter |> select(hospital, encounter_current_location_code, encounter_current_location_name) |> tbl_summary(by = hospital)

```

Some encounters from LUKS have no Administrative Case, but it seems that the "case id" is in the "Identifier" variable of the Healthcare Encounter concept. However, the cases to not exist in the Administrative Case concept.

I create "Administrative Cases" from the information in the Healthcare Encounter concept, to not miss these cases when linking by case_id.

```{r}

data_missing_LUKS_cases <- data_encounter |> 
  filter(is.na(case_id)) |> 
  mutate(case_id = Identifier) |> 
  group_by(case_id) |> 
  mutate(case_carehandling = NA,
         case_admission_datetime = min(encounter_start_datetime),
         case_discharge_datetime = max(encounter_end_datetime),
         case_duration_hours = as.numeric(difftime(case_discharge_datetime, case_admission_datetime, units = "hours")),
         case_duration_days = as.numeric(difftime(case_discharge_datetime, case_admission_datetime, units = "days"))) |> 
  mutate(age_days_case_admission = as.numeric(difftime(case_admission_datetime, birth_date, units = "days")),
         age_years_case_admission = age_days_case_admission/365.25,
         age_days_case_discharge = as.numeric(difftime(case_discharge_datetime, birth_date, units = "days")),
         age_years_case_discharge = age_days_case_discharge/365.25) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(hospital, participant_id, sex, birth_date, gestational_age_weeks, delivery_mode, consent_type, consent_status, country_residence, swiss_sep_3, distance_residence_sep, nationality, case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge)

data_case <- data_case |> 
  bind_rows(data_missing_LUKS_cases)

data_encounter <- data_encounter |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(case_id) ~ Identifier,
                             TRUE ~ case_id)) |> 
  select(-c(case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge, Identifier)) |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge), by = "case_id")

data_encounter <- data_encounter |> 
    select(hospital, participant_id, sex, birth_date, gestational_age_weeks, delivery_mode, consent_type, consent_status, country_residence, swiss_sep_3, distance_residence_sep, nationality, case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge, encounter_id, encounter_carehandling, encounter_specialty, encounter_origin_location_name, encounter_origin_location_code, encounter_current_location_name, encounter_current_location_code, encounter_target_location_name, encounter_target_location_code, encounter_start_datetime, encounter_end_datetime, encounter_duration_minutes,  encounter_duration_hours, encounter_duration_days, age_days_encounter_start, age_years_encounter_start, age_days_encounter_end, age_years_encounter_end)

```


Check encounter again

```{r}

data_encounter |> 
  select(hospital, participant_id, sex, case_id, case_admission_datetime, encounter_id, encounter_carehandling, encounter_specialty, encounter_origin_location_name, encounter_origin_location_code, encounter_current_location_name, encounter_current_location_code, encounter_target_location_name, encounter_target_location_code, encounter_start_datetime, encounter_end_datetime, encounter_duration_minutes,  encounter_duration_hours, encounter_duration_days, age_days_encounter_start, age_years_encounter_start, age_days_encounter_end, age_years_encounter_end) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = "hospital",
              type = c("participant_id", "case_id", "encounter_id", "encounter_specialty", "encounter_origin_location_name", "encounter_origin_location_code", "encounter_current_location_name", "encounter_current_location_code", "encounter_target_location_name", "encounter_target_location_code") ~ "continuous2",
              statistic = list(
                all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({min}, {max})",
                all_continuous2() ~ "{N_obs}"
                ),
              missing = "always",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)") |> 
  add_overall()

cat("number of encounter id's:", data_encounter |> nrow(), "\n")
cat("number of distinct encounter id's:", data_encounter |> distinct(encounter_id) |>  nrow(), "\n")

```


### Visits

We would like to describe hospital visits. A hospital visit as we imagine it is a physical visit of a child to the hospital, where the doctor and nurses document the clinical status of the child, make diagnostic tests, record a diagnosis, and define a procedere (therapy/medication).
Unfortunately, neither AdministrativeCase nor HealthcareEncounter is captures such "hospital visits".
- AdministrativeCases seem to capture inpatient stays correctly (1 inpatient stay --> 1 AdministrativeCase, 1 AdministrativeCase --> 1 inpatient stay). But AdministrativeCases seem to incorrectly capture outpatient visits (1 outpatient visit --> 1/n AdministrativeCase, 1 AdministrativeCase --> n outpatient visits).
- HealthcareEncounter seems to incorrectly capture inpatient stays (1 inpatient stay --> n HealthcareEncounters, 1 HealthcareEncounter --> 1/n inpatient stay). Healthcareencounter also seems to incorrecly capture outpatient visits (1 outpatient visit --> n HealthcareEncounters, 1 HealthcareEncounter --> 1/n outpatient visit).

Code visits based on information from AdministrativeCase and HealthcareEncounter.
- Inpatient stays: HealthcareEncounters with same case_id as one inpatient stay.
- Outpatient visits: HealthcareEncounters with same case_id and on the same day. Separately also in the same week.
- ER visits: HealthcareEncounters with same case_id and on the same day. Separately also in the same week.

```{r}

data_inpatient_stay_day <- data_encounter |> 
  filter(encounter_carehandling == "Inpatient encounter") |> 
  group_by(case_id) |> 
  mutate(visit_day_id = paste0("inpatient-stay-day-", cur_group_id()),
         visit_day_start_datetime = case_admission_datetime,
         visit_day_end_datetime = case_discharge_datetime,
         age_years_visit_day_start = age_years_case_admission,
         age_years_visit_day_end = age_years_case_discharge,
         visit_day_type = "Inpatient stay") |> 
  ungroup()

data_inpatient_stay_week <- data_encounter |> 
  filter(encounter_carehandling == "Inpatient encounter") |> 
  group_by(case_id) |> 
  mutate(visit_week_id = paste0("inpatient-stay-week-", cur_group_id()),
         visit_week_start_datetime = case_admission_datetime,
         visit_week_end_datetime = case_discharge_datetime,
         age_years_visit_week_start = age_years_case_admission,
         age_years_visit_week_end = age_years_case_discharge,
         visit_week_type = "Inpatient stay") |> 
  ungroup()


data_outpatient_visit_day <- data_encounter |> 
  filter(encounter_carehandling == "Outpatient encounter") |> 
  mutate(encounter_start_date = date(encounter_start_datetime)) |> 
  group_by(case_id, encounter_start_date) |> 
  mutate(visit_day_id = paste0("outpatient-visit-day-", cur_group_id()),
         visit_day_start_datetime = min(encounter_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = max(encounter_end_datetime),
         age_years_visit_day_start = min(age_years_encounter_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = max(age_years_encounter_end),
         visit_day_type = "Outpatient visit") |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-(encounter_start_date))


data_outpatient_visit_week <- data_encounter |> 
  filter(encounter_carehandling == "Outpatient encounter") |> 
  mutate(encounter_start_week = floor_date(encounter_start_datetime, unit = "week", week_start = 1)) |> 
  group_by(case_id, encounter_start_week) |> 
  mutate(visit_week_id = paste0("outpatient-visit-week-", cur_group_id()),
         visit_week_start_datetime = min(encounter_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = max(encounter_end_datetime),
         age_years_visit_week_start = min(age_years_encounter_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = max(age_years_encounter_end),
         visit_week_type = "Outpatient visit") |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-(encounter_start_week))

data_ER_visit_day <- data_encounter |> 
  filter(encounter_carehandling == "ER encounter") |> 
  mutate(encounter_start_date = date(encounter_start_datetime)) |> 
  group_by(case_id, encounter_start_date) |> 
  mutate(visit_day_id = paste0("ER-visit-day-", cur_group_id()),
         visit_day_start_datetime = min(encounter_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = max(encounter_end_datetime),
         age_years_visit_day_start = min(age_years_encounter_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = max(age_years_encounter_end),
         visit_day_type = "ER visit") |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-(encounter_start_date))


data_ER_visit_week <- data_encounter |> 
  filter(encounter_carehandling == "ER encounter") |> 
  mutate(encounter_start_week = floor_date(encounter_start_datetime, unit = "week", week_start = 1)) |> 
  group_by(case_id, encounter_start_week) |> 
  mutate(visit_week_id = paste0("ER-visit-week-", cur_group_id()),
         visit_week_start_datetime = min(encounter_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = max(encounter_end_datetime),
         age_years_visit_week_start = min(age_years_encounter_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = max(age_years_encounter_end),
         visit_week_type = "ER visit") |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-(encounter_start_week))


data_NA_visit_day <- data_encounter |> 
  filter(is.na(encounter_carehandling)) |> 
  mutate(encounter_start_date = date(encounter_start_datetime)) |> 
  group_by(case_id, encounter_start_date) |> 
  mutate(visit_day_id = paste0("NA-visit-day-", cur_group_id()),
         visit_day_start_datetime = min(encounter_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = max(encounter_end_datetime),
         age_years_visit_day_start = min(age_years_encounter_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = max(age_years_encounter_end),
         visit_day_type = NA) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-(encounter_start_date))


data_NA_visit_week <- data_encounter |> 
  filter(is.na(encounter_carehandling)) |> 
  mutate(encounter_start_week = floor_date(encounter_start_datetime, unit = "week", week_start = 1)) |> 
  group_by(case_id, encounter_start_week) |> 
  mutate(visit_week_id = paste0("NA-visit-week-", cur_group_id()),
         visit_week_start_datetime = min(encounter_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = max(encounter_end_datetime),
         age_years_visit_week_start = min(age_years_encounter_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = max(age_years_encounter_end),
         visit_week_type = NA) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-(encounter_start_week))

data_visit_day <- data_inpatient_stay_day |> 
  bind_rows(data_outpatient_visit_day) |> 
  bind_rows(data_ER_visit_day) |> 
  bind_rows(data_NA_visit_day)

data_visit_week <- data_inpatient_stay_week |> 
  bind_rows(data_outpatient_visit_week) |> 
  bind_rows(data_ER_visit_week) |> 
  bind_rows(data_NA_visit_week)

```

Add these visits to the encounter dataset

```{r}

data_encounter <- data_encounter |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(encounter_id, visit_day_id, visit_day_start_datetime, visit_day_end_datetime, age_years_visit_day_start, age_years_visit_day_end, visit_day_type), by = "encounter_id") |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(encounter_id, visit_week_id, visit_week_start_datetime, visit_week_end_datetime, age_years_visit_week_start, age_years_visit_week_end, visit_week_type), by = "encounter_id")


```

Keep one visit per visit_id and select the visit data

```{r}

data_visit_day <- data_visit_day |> 
  group_by(visit_day_id) |> 
  arrange(desc(encounter_duration_hours)) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup()

data_visit_week <- data_visit_week |> 
  group_by(visit_week_id) |> 
  arrange(desc(encounter_duration_hours)) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup()


```


```{r}

cat("number of distinct encounter id's:", data_encounter |> distinct(encounter_id) |>  nrow(), "\n")
cat("number of distinct visit day id's:", data_visit_day |> distinct(visit_day_id) |>  nrow(), "\n")
cat("number of distinct visit week id's:", data_visit_week |> distinct(visit_week_id) |>  nrow(), "\n")
cat("number of distinct case id's:", data_case |> distinct(case_id) |>  nrow(), "\n")

```


# Clinical data
### Billed Diagnosis

```{r, message = FALSE}
data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis_sphn2025.2

data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  rename("participant_id" = "SubjectPseudoIdentifier_Identifier") |> 
  left_join(data_participant, by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never") |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(AdministrativeCase_Identifier) ~ str_extract(AdministrativeCase, "(?<=AdministrativeCase-).*"),
         TRUE ~ AdministrativeCase_Identifier)) |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never") |> 
  rename("diagnosis_id" = "BilledDiagnosis",
         "diagnosis_rank" = "RankCode_Label",
         "diagnosis_record_datetime" = "RecordDateTime",
         "diagnosis_icd10_code" = "Code",
         "diagnosis_icd10_code_label" = "Code_Label") |> 
  mutate(diagnosis_id = gsub(".*BilledDiagnosis-", "", diagnosis_id),
         diagnosis_record_datetime = ymd_hms(diagnosis_record_datetime),
         diagnosis_icd10_code = gsub(".*icd-10-gm/\\d{4}/", "", diagnosis_icd10_code),
         age_days_diagnosis = as.numeric(difftime(diagnosis_record_datetime, birth_date, units = c("days"))),
         age_years_diagnosis = age_days_diagnosis/365.25) |> 
  select(hospital, participant_id, birth_date, sex, case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge, diagnosis_id, diagnosis_icd10_code, diagnosis_icd10_code_label, diagnosis_rank, diagnosis_record_datetime, age_days_diagnosis, age_years_diagnosis)
```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add visit day

data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(participant_id, case_id, visit_day_id, visit_day_start_datetime, visit_day_end_datetime, age_years_visit_day_start, age_years_visit_day_end, visit_day_type) |> rename("case_id_visit_day" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable visit
# Because diagnoses should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an visit, we keep one healthcare visit in the following order
## time of diagnosis between visit start and visit end & same case_id
## time of diagnosis within -1 or 30 days after visit start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis closest -1 or XX days after visit start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis closest to visit start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis between visit start and visit end
## time of diagnosis within -1 or 30 days after visit start
## time of diagnosis closest -1 or XX days after visit start
## time of diagnosis closest to visit start

data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(diagnosis_record_datetime, visit_day_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_visit_day_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(diagnosis_record_datetime, visit_day_start_datetime, units = "days")),
         visit_day_type = factor(visit_day_type, levels = c("Inpatient stay", "Outpatient visit", "ER visit")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_visit_day) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_visit_day ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_visit_day ~ FALSE),
         visit_day_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           diagnosis_record_datetime >= visit_day_start_datetime & diagnosis_record_datetime <= visit_day_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - visit_day time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_day_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest visit_day before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest visit_day and same case_id",
           diagnosis_record_datetime >= visit_day_start_datetime & diagnosis_record_datetime <= visit_day_end_datetime ~ "5 - visit_day time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_day_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest visit_day before record not same case_id",
           !is.na(time_after_visit_day_start_days) ~ "8 - closest visit_day not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "9 - same participant not same case_id no time"), levels = c("1 - visit_day time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest visit_day before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest visit_day and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - visit_day time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "7 - closest visit_day before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest visit_day not same case_id",
                                                                        "9 - same participant not same case_id no time")),
         time_abs_after_visit_day_start = abs(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(diagnosis_id) |> 
  arrange(visit_day_link_quality, time_abs_after_visit_day_start, visit_day_type, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes, time_after_visit_day_start_days, time_abs_after_visit_day_start, same_case))


data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(visit_day_link_quality = case_when(is.na(visit_day_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality))

```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add visit week

data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(participant_id, case_id, visit_week_id, visit_week_start_datetime, visit_week_end_datetime, age_years_visit_week_start, age_years_visit_week_end, visit_week_type) |> rename("case_id_visit_week" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable visit
# Because diagnoses should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an visit, we keep one healthcare visit in the following order
## time of diagnosis between visit start and visit end & same case_id
## time of diagnosis within -1 or 30 days after visit start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis closest -1 or XX days after visit start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis closest to visit start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis between visit start and visit end
## time of diagnosis within -1 or 30 days after visit start
## time of diagnosis closest -1 or XX days after visit start
## time of diagnosis closest to visit start

data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(diagnosis_record_datetime, visit_week_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_visit_week_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(diagnosis_record_datetime, visit_week_start_datetime, units = "weeks")),
         visit_week_type = factor(visit_week_type, levels = c("Inpatient stay", "Outpatient visit", "ER visit")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_visit_week) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_visit_week ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_visit_week ~ FALSE),
         visit_week_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           diagnosis_record_datetime >= visit_week_start_datetime & diagnosis_record_datetime <= visit_week_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - visit_week time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_week_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest visit_week before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest visit_week and same case_id",
           diagnosis_record_datetime >= visit_week_start_datetime & diagnosis_record_datetime <= visit_week_end_datetime ~ "5 - visit_week time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_week_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest visit_week before record not same case_id",
           !is.na(time_after_visit_week_start_days) ~ "8 - closest visit_week not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "9 - same participant not same case_id no time"), levels = c("1 - visit_week time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest visit_week before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest visit_week and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - visit_week time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "7 - closest visit_week before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest visit_week not same case_id",
                                                                        "9 - same participant not same case_id no time")),
         time_abs_after_visit_week_start = abs(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(diagnosis_id) |> 
  arrange(visit_week_link_quality, time_abs_after_visit_week_start, visit_week_type, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes, time_after_visit_week_start_days, time_abs_after_visit_week_start, same_case))


data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(visit_week_link_quality = case_when(is.na(visit_week_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality))


```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add healthcare encounter

data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(participant_id, case_id, encounter_id, encounter_specialty, encounter_origin_location_name, encounter_origin_location_code, encounter_current_location_name, encounter_current_location_code, encounter_target_location_name, encounter_target_location_code, encounter_start_datetime, encounter_end_datetime, encounter_duration_minutes,  encounter_duration_hours, encounter_duration_days, age_days_encounter_start, age_years_encounter_start, age_days_encounter_end, age_years_encounter_end, encounter_carehandling) |> rename("case_id_encounter" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable healthcare encounter
# Because diagnoses should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an encounter, we keep one healthcare encounter in the following order
## time of diagnosis between encounter start and encounter end & same case_id
## time of diagnosis within -1 or 30 days after encounter start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis closest -1 or XX days after encounter start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis closest to encounter start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis between encounter start and encounter end
## time of diagnosis within -1 or 30 days after encounter start
## time of diagnosis closest -1 or XX days after encounter start
## time of diagnosis closest to encounter start

data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(time_after_encounter_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(diagnosis_record_datetime, encounter_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_encounter_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(diagnosis_record_datetime, encounter_start_datetime, units = "days")),
         encounter_carehandling = factor(encounter_carehandling, levels = c("Inpatient encounter", "Outpatient encounter", "ER encounter")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_encounter) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_encounter ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_encounter ~ FALSE),
         encounter_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           diagnosis_record_datetime >= encounter_start_datetime & diagnosis_record_datetime <= encounter_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - encounter time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & time_after_encounter_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest encounter within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest encounter before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest encounter and same case_id",
           diagnosis_record_datetime >= encounter_start_datetime & diagnosis_record_datetime <= encounter_end_datetime ~ "5 - encounter time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & time_after_encounter_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest encounter within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest encounter before record not same case_id",
           !is.na(time_after_encounter_start_days) ~ "8 - closest encounter not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "9 - same participant not same case_id no time"), levels = c("1 - encounter time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest encounter within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest encounter before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest encounter and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - encounter time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest encounter within 30 days before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "7 - closest encounter before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest encounter not same case_id",
                                                                        "9 - same participant not same case_id no time")),
         time_abs_after_encounter_start = abs(time_after_encounter_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(diagnosis_id) |> 
  arrange(encounter_link_quality, time_abs_after_encounter_start, encounter_carehandling, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(same_case, time_after_encounter_start_minutes, time_after_encounter_start_days, time_abs_after_encounter_start))


data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(encounter_link_quality = case_when(is.na(encounter_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality))


```


Check Billed Diagnoses

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_billed_diagnosis |> select(hospital, participant_id, sex, case_id, case_admission_datetime, visit_day_id, visit_day_link_quality, visit_day_start_datetime, visit_week_id, visit_week_link_quality, visit_week_start_datetime, encounter_id, encounter_link_quality, encounter_start_datetime, diagnosis_id, diagnosis_icd10_code, diagnosis_icd10_code_label, diagnosis_rank, diagnosis_record_datetime, age_days_diagnosis, age_years_diagnosis ) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = "hospital",
              type = c("participant_id", "case_id", "visit_day_id", "visit_week_id", "encounter_id", "diagnosis_id", "diagnosis_icd10_code", "diagnosis_icd10_code_label") ~ "continuous2",
              statistic = list(
                all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({min}, {max})",
                all_continuous2() ~ "{N_obs}"
                ),
              missing = "always",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)") |> 
  add_overall()

cat("number of diagnosis id's:", data_billed_diagnosis |> nrow(), "\n")
cat("number of distinct diagnosis id's:", data_billed_diagnosis |> distinct(diagnosis_id) |>  nrow(), "\n")


```


### Diagnosis

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis_sphn2025.2 |>
  rename("Code_Label" = "One_Code_Label", "Code_DbXref" = "One_Code_DbXref") |> 
  group_by(Diagnosis) |> 
  arrange(RecordDateTime) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup()

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  rename("participant_id" = "SubjectPseudoIdentifier_Identifier") |> 
  left_join(data_participant, by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never") |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(AdministrativeCase_Identifier) ~ str_extract(AdministrativeCase, "(?<=AdministrativeCase-).*"),
         TRUE ~ AdministrativeCase_Identifier)) |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never") |> 
  rename("diagnosis_id" = "Diagnosis",
         "diagnosis_record_datetime" = "RecordDateTime") |> 
  mutate(diagnosis_id = gsub(".*Diagnosis-", "", diagnosis_id),
         diagnosis_record_datetime = ymd_hms(diagnosis_record_datetime),
         diagnosis_icd10_code = case_when(gsub(".*icd-10-gm/\\d{4}/", "", Code) != Code ~ gsub(".*icd-10-gm/\\d{4}/", "", Code),
                                          TRUE ~ NA),
         diagnosis_orpha_code = case_when(gsub(".*Orphanet_", "", Code) != Code ~ gsub(".*Orphanet_", "", Code),
                                          TRUE ~ NA),
         diagnosis_orpha_code_associated_icd = Code_DbXref,
         diagnosis_icd10_code_label = case_when(is.na(diagnosis_icd10_code)==FALSE ~ Code_Label,
                                                 TRUE ~ NA),
         diagnosis_orpha_code_label = case_when(is.na(diagnosis_orpha_code) == FALSE ~ Code_Label),
         age_days_diagnosis = as.numeric(difftime(diagnosis_record_datetime, birth_date, units = c("days"))),
         age_years_diagnosis = age_days_diagnosis/365.25) |> 
  select(hospital, participant_id, birth_date, sex, case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge, diagnosis_id, diagnosis_icd10_code, diagnosis_icd10_code_label, diagnosis_orpha_code, diagnosis_orpha_code_associated_icd, diagnosis_orpha_code_label, diagnosis_record_datetime, age_days_diagnosis, age_years_diagnosis)


```



```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add visit day

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(participant_id, case_id, visit_day_id, visit_day_start_datetime, visit_day_end_datetime, age_years_visit_day_start, age_years_visit_day_end, visit_day_type) |> rename("case_id_visit_day" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable visit
# Because diagnoses should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an visit, we keep one healthcare visit in the following order
## time of diagnosis between visit start and visit end & same case_id
## time of diagnosis within -1 or 30 days after visit start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis closest -1 or XX days after visit start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis closest to visit start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis between visit start and visit end
## time of diagnosis within -1 or 30 days after visit start
## time of diagnosis closest -1 or XX days after visit start
## time of diagnosis closest to visit start

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(diagnosis_record_datetime, visit_day_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_visit_day_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(diagnosis_record_datetime, visit_day_start_datetime, units = "days")),
         visit_day_type = factor(visit_day_type, levels = c("Inpatient stay", "Outpatient visit", "ER visit")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_visit_day) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_visit_day ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_visit_day ~ FALSE),
         visit_day_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           diagnosis_record_datetime >= visit_day_start_datetime & diagnosis_record_datetime <= visit_day_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - visit_day time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_day_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest visit_day before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest visit_day and same case_id",
           diagnosis_record_datetime >= visit_day_start_datetime & diagnosis_record_datetime <= visit_day_end_datetime ~ "5 - visit_day time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_day_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest visit_day before record not same case_id",
           !is.na(time_after_visit_day_start_days) ~ "8 - closest visit_day not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "9 - same participant not same case_id no time"), levels = c("1 - visit_day time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest visit_day before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest visit_day and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - visit_day time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "7 - closest visit_day before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest visit_day not same case_id",
                                                                        "9 - same participant not same case_id no time")),
         time_abs_after_visit_day_start = abs(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(diagnosis_id) |> 
  arrange(visit_day_link_quality, time_abs_after_visit_day_start, visit_day_type, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes, time_after_visit_day_start_days, time_abs_after_visit_day_start, same_case))

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(visit_day_link_quality = case_when(is.na(visit_day_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality))


```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add visit week

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(participant_id, case_id, visit_week_id, visit_week_start_datetime, visit_week_end_datetime, age_years_visit_week_start, age_years_visit_week_end, visit_week_type) |> rename("case_id_visit_week" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable visit
# Because diagnoses should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an visit, we keep one healthcare visit in the following order
## time of diagnosis between visit start and visit end & same case_id
## time of diagnosis within -1 or 30 days after visit start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis closest -1 or XX days after visit start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis closest to visit start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis between visit start and visit end
## time of diagnosis within -1 or 30 days after visit start
## time of diagnosis closest -1 or XX days after visit start
## time of diagnosis closest to visit start

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(diagnosis_record_datetime, visit_week_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_visit_week_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(diagnosis_record_datetime, visit_week_start_datetime, units = "weeks")),
         visit_week_type = factor(visit_week_type, levels = c("Inpatient stay", "Outpatient visit", "ER visit")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_visit_week) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_visit_week ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_visit_week ~ FALSE),
         visit_week_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           diagnosis_record_datetime >= visit_week_start_datetime & diagnosis_record_datetime <= visit_week_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - visit_week time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_week_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest visit_week before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest visit_week and same case_id",
           diagnosis_record_datetime >= visit_week_start_datetime & diagnosis_record_datetime <= visit_week_end_datetime ~ "5 - visit_week time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_week_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest visit_week before record not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "8 - closest visit_week not same case_id"), levels = c("1 - visit_week time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest visit_week before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest visit_week and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - visit_week time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "7 - closest visit_week before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest visit_week not same case_id")),
         time_abs_after_visit_week_start = abs(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(diagnosis_id) |> 
  arrange(visit_week_link_quality, time_abs_after_visit_week_start, visit_week_type, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes, time_after_visit_week_start_days, time_abs_after_visit_week_start, same_case))


data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(visit_week_link_quality = case_when(is.na(visit_week_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality))

```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add healthcare encounter

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(participant_id, case_id, encounter_id, encounter_specialty, encounter_origin_location_name, encounter_origin_location_code, encounter_current_location_name, encounter_current_location_code, encounter_target_location_name, encounter_target_location_code, encounter_start_datetime, encounter_end_datetime, encounter_duration_minutes,  encounter_duration_hours, encounter_duration_days, age_days_encounter_start, age_years_encounter_start, age_days_encounter_end, age_years_encounter_end, encounter_carehandling) |> rename("case_id_encounter" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable healthcare encounter
# Because diagnoses should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an encounter, we keep one healthcare encounter in the following order
## time of diagnosis between encounter start and encounter end & same case_id
## time of diagnosis within -1 or 30 days after encounter start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis closest -1 or XX days after encounter start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis closest to encounter start & same case_id
## time of diagnosis between encounter start and encounter end
## time of diagnosis within -1 or 30 days after encounter start
## time of diagnosis closest -1 or XX days after encounter start
## time of diagnosis closest to encounter start

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(time_after_encounter_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(diagnosis_record_datetime, encounter_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_encounter_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(diagnosis_record_datetime, encounter_start_datetime, units = "days")),
         encounter_carehandling = factor(encounter_carehandling, levels = c("Inpatient encounter", "Outpatient encounter", "ER encounter")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_encounter) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_encounter ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_encounter ~ FALSE),
         encounter_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           diagnosis_record_datetime >= encounter_start_datetime & diagnosis_record_datetime <= encounter_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - encounter time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & time_after_encounter_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest encounter within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest encounter before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest encounter and same case_id",
           diagnosis_record_datetime >= encounter_start_datetime & diagnosis_record_datetime <= encounter_end_datetime ~ "5 - encounter time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & time_after_encounter_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest encounter within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest encounter before record not same case_id",
           !is.na(time_after_encounter_start_days) ~ "8 - closest encounter not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "9 - same participant not same case_id no time"), levels = c("1 - encounter time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest encounter within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest encounter before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest encounter and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - encounter time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest encounter within 30 days before record not same case_id",
```
