```{r, message = FALSE}
                                                                        "7 - closest encounter before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest encounter not same case_id",
                                                                        "9 - same participant not same case_id no time")),
         time_abs_after_encounter_start = abs(time_after_encounter_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(diagnosis_id) |> 
  arrange(encounter_link_quality, time_abs_after_encounter_start, encounter_carehandling, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(same_case, time_after_encounter_start_minutes, time_after_encounter_start_days, time_abs_after_encounter_start))


data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(encounter_link_quality = case_when(is.na(encounter_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality))


```

Check Diagnosis

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_diagnosis |> select(hospital, participant_id, sex, case_id, case_admission_datetime, visit_day_id, visit_day_link_quality, visit_day_start_datetime, visit_week_id, visit_week_link_quality, visit_week_start_datetime, encounter_id, encounter_link_quality, encounter_start_datetime, diagnosis_id, diagnosis_icd10_code, diagnosis_icd10_code_label, diagnosis_orpha_code, diagnosis_orpha_code_associated_icd, diagnosis_orpha_code_label, age_days_diagnosis, age_years_diagnosis ) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = "hospital",
              type = c("participant_id", "case_id", "encounter_id", "visit_day_id", "visit_week_id", "diagnosis_id", "diagnosis_icd10_code", "diagnosis_icd10_code_label", "diagnosis_orpha_code", "diagnosis_orpha_code_associated_icd", "diagnosis_orpha_code_label") ~ "continuous2",
              statistic = list(
                all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({min}, {max})",
                all_continuous2() ~ "{N_obs}"
                ),
              missing = "always",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)") |> 
  add_overall()

cat("number of diagnosis id's:", data_diagnosis |> nrow(), "\n")
cat("number of distinct diagnosis id's:", data_diagnosis |> distinct(diagnosis_id) |>  nrow(), "\n")


```


### Diagnoses combined

```{r}

data_diagnoses <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  bind_rows(data_diagnosis)

data_diagnoses |> distinct(diagnosis_id) |> nrow()

```



# Anthropometric data

Because this will need a lot of memory I delete original datasets of cleaned datasets:

```{r}

rm(data_participant_sphn2025.2, data_birth_sphn2025.2, data_sex_sphn2025.2, data_consent_sphn2025.2, data_nationality_sphn2025.2, data_home_sphn2025.2, data_case_sphn2025.2, data_encounter_sphn2025.2, data_billed_diagnosis_sphn2025.2, data_diagnosis_sphn2025.2,
   data_participant_sphn2024.2, data_birth_sphn2024.2, data_sex_sphn2024.2, data_consent_sphn2024.2, data_nationality_sphn2024.2, data_home_sphn2024.2, data_home_sphn2024.2, data_case_sphn2024.2, data_encounter_sphn2024.2, data_billed_diagnosis_sphn2024.2, data_diagnosis_sphn2024.2)

gc()

```


## Height

```{r}
data_height <- data_height_sphn2025.2 |> 
  mutate(timediff = abs(as.integer(ymd_hms(StartDateTime) - ymd_hms(Result_DateTime)))) |> 
  group_by(BodyHeightMeasurement) |> 
  arrange(timediff) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup()

data_height <- data_height |> 
  bind_rows(data_height_sphn2024.2)

data_height <- data_height |> 
  rename("participant_id" = "SubjectPseudoIdentifier_Identifier") |> 
  left_join(data_participant, by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never") |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(AdministrativeCase_Identifier) ~ str_extract(AdministrativeCase, "(?<=AdministrativeCase-).*"),
         TRUE ~ AdministrativeCase_Identifier)) |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never") |> 
  rename("height_id" = "BodyHeightMeasurement",
         "original_unit" = "Result_Quantity_Unit",
         "original_height" = "Result_Quantity_Value") |> 
  mutate(height_datetime = case_when(is.na(Result_DateTime) & is.na(StartDateTime) ~ ymd_hms(EndDateTime),
                                     is.na(Result_DateTime) ~ ymd_hms(StartDateTime),
                                     TRUE ~ ymd_hms(Result_DateTime)),
         height_id = gsub(".*BodyHeightMeasurement-", "", height_id),
         original_unit = factor(original_unit),
         height_cm = case_when(original_unit == "cm" ~ original_height,
                               original_unit == "m" ~ original_height*100),
         age_days_height = as.integer(difftime(height_datetime, birth_date, units = c("days"))),
         age_years_height = age_days_height/365.25,
         sex = case_when(sex == "Female" ~ "f",
                         sex == "Male" ~ "m")) |> 
  select(hospital, participant_id, birth_date, sex, case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge, height_id, height_datetime, original_height, original_unit, height_cm, age_days_height, age_years_height)
```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add visit day

data_height <- data_height |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(participant_id, case_id, visit_day_id, visit_day_start_datetime, visit_day_end_datetime, age_years_visit_day_start, age_years_visit_day_end, visit_day_type) |> rename("case_id_visit_day" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable visit
# Because heights should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an visit, we keep one healthcare visit in the following order
## time of height between visit start and visit end & same case_id
## time of height within -1 or 30 days after visit start & same case_id
## time of height closest -1 or XX days after visit start & same case_id
## time of height closest to visit start & same case_id
## time of height between visit start and visit end
## time of height within -1 or 30 days after visit start
## time of height closest -1 or XX days after visit start
## time of height closest to visit start

data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(height_datetime, visit_day_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_visit_day_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(height_datetime, visit_day_start_datetime, units = "days")),
         visit_day_type = factor(visit_day_type, levels = c("Inpatient stay", "Outpatient visit", "ER visit")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_visit_day) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_visit_day ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_visit_day ~ FALSE),
         visit_day_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           height_datetime >= visit_day_start_datetime & height_datetime <= visit_day_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - visit_day time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_day_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest visit_day before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest visit_day and same case_id",
           height_datetime >= visit_day_start_datetime & height_datetime <= visit_day_end_datetime ~ "5 - visit_day time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_day_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest visit_day before record not same case_id",
           !is.na(time_after_visit_day_start_days) ~ "8 - closest visit_day not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "9 - same participant not same case_id no time"), levels = c("1 - visit_day time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest visit_day before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest visit_day and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - visit_day time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "7 - closest visit_day before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest visit_day not same case_id",
                                                                        "9 - same participant not same case_id no time")),
         time_abs_after_visit_day_start = abs(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(height_id) |> 
  arrange(visit_day_link_quality, time_abs_after_visit_day_start, visit_day_type, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes, time_after_visit_day_start_days, time_abs_after_visit_day_start, same_case))


data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(visit_day_link_quality = case_when(is.na(visit_day_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality))

```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add visit week

data_height <- data_height |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(participant_id, case_id, visit_week_id, visit_week_start_datetime, visit_week_end_datetime, age_years_visit_week_start, age_years_visit_week_end, visit_week_type) |> rename("case_id_visit_week" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable visit
# Because diagnoses should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an visit, we keep one healthcare visit in the following order
## time of height between visit start and visit end & same case_id
## time of height within -1 or 30 days after visit start & same case_id
## time of height closest -1 or XX days after visit start & same case_id
## time of height closest to visit start & same case_id
## time of height between visit start and visit end
## time of height within -1 or 30 days after visit start
## time of height closest -1 or XX days after visit start
## time of height closest to visit start

data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(height_datetime, visit_week_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_visit_week_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(height_datetime, visit_week_start_datetime, units = "weeks")),
         visit_week_type = factor(visit_week_type, levels = c("Inpatient stay", "Outpatient visit", "ER visit")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_visit_week) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_visit_week ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_visit_week ~ FALSE),
         visit_week_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           height_datetime >= visit_week_start_datetime & height_datetime <= visit_week_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - visit_week time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_week_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest visit_week before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest visit_week and same case_id",
           height_datetime >= visit_week_start_datetime & height_datetime <= visit_week_end_datetime ~ "5 - visit_week time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_week_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest visit_week before record not same case_id",
           !is.na(time_after_visit_week_start_days) ~ "8 - closest visit_week not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "9 - same participant not same case_id no time"), levels = c("1 - visit_week time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest visit_week before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest visit_week and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - visit_week time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "7 - closest visit_week before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest visit_week not same case_id",
                                                                        "9 - same participant not same case_id no time")),
         time_abs_after_visit_week_start = abs(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(height_id) |> 
  arrange(visit_week_link_quality, time_abs_after_visit_week_start, visit_week_type, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes, time_after_visit_week_start_days, time_abs_after_visit_week_start, same_case))


data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(visit_week_link_quality = case_when(is.na(visit_week_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality))

```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add healthcare encounter

data_height <- data_height |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(participant_id, case_id, encounter_id, encounter_specialty, encounter_origin_location_name, encounter_origin_location_code, encounter_current_location_name, encounter_current_location_code, encounter_target_location_name, encounter_target_location_code, encounter_start_datetime, encounter_end_datetime, encounter_duration_minutes,  encounter_duration_hours, encounter_duration_days, age_days_encounter_start, age_years_encounter_start, age_days_encounter_end, age_years_encounter_end, encounter_carehandling) |> rename("case_id_encounter" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable healthcare encounter
# Because diagnoses should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an encounter, we keep one healthcare encounter in the following order
## time of height between encounter start and encounter end & same case_id
## time of height within -1 or 30 days after encounter start & same case_id
## time of height closest -1 or XX days after encounter start & same case_id
## time of height closest to encounter start & same case_id
## time of height between encounter start and encounter end
## time of height within -1 or 30 days after encounter start
## time of height closest -1 or XX days after encounter start
## time of height closest to encounter start

data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(time_after_encounter_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(height_datetime, encounter_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_encounter_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(height_datetime, encounter_start_datetime, units = "days")),
         encounter_carehandling = factor(encounter_carehandling, levels = c("Inpatient encounter", "Outpatient encounter", "ER encounter")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_encounter) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_encounter ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_encounter ~ FALSE),
         encounter_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           height_datetime >= encounter_start_datetime & height_datetime <= encounter_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - encounter time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & time_after_encounter_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest encounter within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest encounter before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest encounter and same case_id",
           height_datetime >= encounter_start_datetime & height_datetime <= encounter_end_datetime ~ "5 - encounter time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & time_after_encounter_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest encounter within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest encounter before record not same case_id",
           !is.na(time_after_encounter_start_days) ~ "8 - closest encounter not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "9 - same participant not same case_id no time"), levels = c("1 - encounter time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest encounter within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest encounter before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest encounter and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - encounter time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest encounter within 30 days before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "7 - closest encounter before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest encounter not same case_id",
                                                                        "9 - same participant not same case_id no time")),
         time_abs_after_encounter_start = abs(time_after_encounter_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(height_id) |> 
  arrange(encounter_link_quality, time_abs_after_encounter_start, encounter_carehandling, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(same_case, time_after_encounter_start_minutes, time_after_encounter_start_days, time_abs_after_encounter_start))


data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(encounter_link_quality = case_when(is.na(encounter_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality))


```

Check height data

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_height |> select(hospital, participant_id, sex, case_id, case_admission_datetime, visit_day_id, visit_day_link_quality, visit_day_start_datetime, visit_week_id, visit_week_link_quality, visit_week_start_datetime, encounter_id, encounter_link_quality, encounter_start_datetime, height_id, height_datetime, original_height, original_unit, height_cm, age_days_height, age_years_height) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = "hospital",
              type = c("participant_id", "case_id", "visit_day_id", "visit_week_id", "encounter_id", "height_id") ~ "continuous2",
              statistic = list(
                all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({min}, {max})",
                all_continuous2() ~ "{N_obs}"
                ),
              missing = "always",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)") |> 
  add_overall()

cat("number of height id's:", data_height |> nrow(), "\n")
cat("number of distinct height id's:", data_height |> distinct(height_id) |>  nrow(), "\n")



```



```{r}

rm(data_height_sphn2025.2)
gc()

```


## Weight


```{r}
data_weight <- data_weight_sphn2025.2 |> 
  mutate(timediff = abs(as.integer(ymd_hms(StartDateTime) - ymd_hms(Result_DateTime)))) |> 
  group_by(BodyWeightMeasurement) |> 
  arrange(timediff) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup()

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  bind_rows(data_weight_sphn2024.2)

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  rename("participant_id" = "SubjectPseudoIdentifier_Identifier") |> 
  left_join(data_participant, by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never") |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(AdministrativeCase_Identifier) ~ str_extract(AdministrativeCase, "(?<=AdministrativeCase-).*"),
         TRUE ~ AdministrativeCase_Identifier)) |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never") |> 
  rename("weight_id" = "BodyWeightMeasurement",
         "original_unit" = "Result_Quantity_Unit",
         "original_weight" = "Result_Quantity_Value") |> 
  mutate(weight_datetime = case_when(is.na(Result_DateTime) & is.na(StartDateTime) ~ ymd_hms(EndDateTime),
                                     is.na(Result_DateTime) ~ ymd_hms(StartDateTime),
                                     TRUE ~ ymd_hms(Result_DateTime)),
         weight_id = gsub(".*BodyWeightMeasurement-", "", weight_id),
         original_unit = factor(original_unit),
         weight_kg = case_when(original_unit == "kg" ~ original_weight,
                               original_unit == "g" ~ original_weight/1000),
         age_days_weight = as.integer(difftime(weight_datetime, birth_date, units = c("days"))),
         age_years_weight = age_days_weight/365.25,
         sex = case_when(sex == "Female" ~ "f",
                         sex == "Male" ~ "m")) |> 
  select(hospital, participant_id, birth_date, sex, case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge, weight_id, weight_datetime, original_weight, original_unit, weight_kg, age_days_weight, age_years_weight)
```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add visit day

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(participant_id, case_id, visit_day_id, visit_day_start_datetime, visit_day_end_datetime, age_years_visit_day_start, age_years_visit_day_end, visit_day_type) |> rename("case_id_visit_day" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable visit
# Because weights should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an visit, we keep one healthcare visit in the following order
## time of weight between visit start and visit end & same case_id
## time of weight within -1 or 30 days after visit start & same case_id
## time of weight closest -1 or XX days after visit start & same case_id
## time of weight closest to visit start & same case_id
## time of weight between visit start and visit end
## time of weight within -1 or 30 days after visit start
## time of weight closest -1 or XX days after visit start
## time of weight closest to visit start

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(weight_datetime, visit_day_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_visit_day_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(weight_datetime, visit_day_start_datetime, units = "days")),
         visit_day_type = factor(visit_day_type, levels = c("Inpatient stay", "Outpatient visit", "ER visit")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_visit_day) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_visit_day ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_visit_day ~ FALSE),
         visit_day_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           weight_datetime >= visit_day_start_datetime & weight_datetime <= visit_day_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - visit_day time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_day_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest visit_day before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest visit_day and same case_id",
           weight_datetime >= visit_day_start_datetime & weight_datetime <= visit_day_end_datetime ~ "5 - visit_day time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_day_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest visit_day before record not same case_id",
           !is.na(time_after_visit_day_start_days) ~ "8 - closest visit_day not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "9 - same participant not same case_id no time"), levels = c("1 - visit_day time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest visit_day before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest visit_day and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - visit_day time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "7 - closest visit_day before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest visit_day not same case_id",
                                                                        "9 - same participant not same case_id no time")),
         time_abs_after_visit_day_start = abs(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(weight_id) |> 
  arrange(visit_day_link_quality, time_abs_after_visit_day_start, visit_day_type, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes, time_after_visit_day_start_days, time_abs_after_visit_day_start, same_case))

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(visit_day_link_quality = case_when(is.na(visit_day_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality))

```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add visit week

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(participant_id, case_id, visit_week_id, visit_week_start_datetime, visit_week_end_datetime, age_years_visit_week_start, age_years_visit_week_end, visit_week_type) |> rename("case_id_visit_week" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable visit
# Because diagnoses should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an visit, we keep one healthcare visit in the following order
## time of weight between visit start and visit end & same case_id
## time of weight within -1 or 30 days after visit start & same case_id
## time of weight closest -1 or XX days after visit start & same case_id
## time of weight closest to visit start & same case_id
## time of weight between visit start and visit end
## time of weight within -1 or 30 days after visit start
## time of weight closest -1 or XX days after visit start
## time of weight closest to visit start

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(weight_datetime, visit_week_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_visit_week_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(weight_datetime, visit_week_start_datetime, units = "weeks")),
         visit_week_type = factor(visit_week_type, levels = c("Inpatient stay", "Outpatient visit", "ER visit")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_visit_week) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_visit_week ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_visit_week ~ FALSE),
         visit_week_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           weight_datetime >= visit_week_start_datetime & weight_datetime <= visit_week_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - visit_week time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_week_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest visit_week before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest visit_week and same case_id",
           weight_datetime >= visit_week_start_datetime & weight_datetime <= visit_week_end_datetime ~ "5 - visit_week time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_week_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest visit_week before record not same case_id",
           !is.na(time_after_visit_week_start_days) ~ "8 - closest visit_week not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "9 - same participant not same case_id no time"), levels = c("1 - visit_week time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest visit_week before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest visit_week and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - visit_week time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "7 - closest visit_week before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest visit_week not same case_id",
                                                                        "9 - same participant not same case_id no time")),
         time_abs_after_visit_week_start = abs(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(weight_id) |> 
  arrange(visit_week_link_quality, time_abs_after_visit_week_start, visit_week_type, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes, time_after_visit_week_start_days, time_abs_after_visit_week_start, same_case))

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(visit_week_link_quality = case_when(is.na(visit_week_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality))


```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add healthcare encounter

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(participant_id, case_id, encounter_id, encounter_specialty, encounter_origin_location_name, encounter_origin_location_code, encounter_current_location_name, encounter_current_location_code, encounter_target_location_name, encounter_target_location_code, encounter_start_datetime, encounter_end_datetime, encounter_duration_minutes,  encounter_duration_hours, encounter_duration_days, age_days_encounter_start, age_years_encounter_start, age_days_encounter_end, age_years_encounter_end, encounter_carehandling) |> rename("case_id_encounter" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable healthcare encounter
# Because diagnoses should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an encounter, we keep one healthcare encounter in the following order
## time of weight between encounter start and encounter end & same case_id
## time of weight within -1 or 30 days after encounter start & same case_id
## time of weight closest -1 or XX days after encounter start & same case_id
## time of weight closest to encounter start & same case_id
## time of weight between encounter start and encounter end
## time of weight within -1 or 30 days after encounter start
## time of weight closest -1 or XX days after encounter start
## time of weight closest to encounter start

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(time_after_encounter_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(weight_datetime, encounter_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_encounter_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(weight_datetime, encounter_start_datetime, units = "days")),
         encounter_carehandling = factor(encounter_carehandling, levels = c("Inpatient encounter", "Outpatient encounter", "ER encounter")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_encounter) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_encounter ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_encounter ~ FALSE),
         encounter_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           weight_datetime >= encounter_start_datetime & weight_datetime <= encounter_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - encounter time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & time_after_encounter_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest encounter within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest encounter before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest encounter and same case_id",
           weight_datetime >= encounter_start_datetime & weight_datetime <= encounter_end_datetime ~ "5 - encounter time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & time_after_encounter_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest encounter within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest encounter before record not same case_id",
           !is.na(time_after_encounter_start_days) ~ "8 - closest encounter not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "9 - same participant not same case_id no time"), levels = c("1 - encounter time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest encounter within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest encounter before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest encounter and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - encounter time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest encounter within 30 days before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "7 - closest encounter before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest encounter not same case_id",
                                                                        "9 - same participant not same case_id no time")),
         time_abs_after_encounter_start = abs(time_after_encounter_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(weight_id) |> 
  arrange(encounter_link_quality, time_abs_after_encounter_start, encounter_carehandling, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(same_case, time_after_encounter_start_minutes, time_after_encounter_start_days, time_abs_after_encounter_start))


data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(encounter_link_quality = case_when(is.na(encounter_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality))


```


Check weight data

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_weight |> select(hospital, participant_id, sex, case_id, case_admission_datetime, visit_day_id, visit_day_link_quality, visit_day_start_datetime, visit_week_id, visit_week_link_quality, visit_week_start_datetime, encounter_id, encounter_link_quality, encounter_start_datetime, weight_id, weight_datetime, original_weight, original_unit, weight_kg, age_days_weight, age_years_weight) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = "hospital",
              type = c("participant_id", "case_id", "visit_day_id", "visit_week_id", "encounter_id", "weight_id") ~ "continuous2",
              statistic = list(
                all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({min}, {max})",
                all_continuous2() ~ "{N_obs}"
                ),
              missing = "always",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)") |> 
  add_overall()

cat("number of weight id's:", data_weight |> nrow(), "\n")
cat("number of distinct weight id's:", data_weight |> distinct(weight_id) |>  nrow(), "\n")



```



```{r}

rm(data_weight_sphn2025.2)
gc()

```


## Circumference

```{r}
data_circumference <- data_circumference_sphn2025.2 |> 
  group_by(CircumferenceMeasurement) |> 
  arrange(Result_DateTime) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup()

data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  rename("participant_id" = "SubjectPseudoIdentifier_Identifier") |> 
  left_join(data_participant, by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never") |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(AdministrativeCase_Identifier) ~ str_extract(AdministrativeCase, "(?<=AdministrativeCase-).*"),
        TRUE ~ AdministrativeCase_Identifier)) |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never") |> 
  rename("circumference_id" = "CircumferenceMeasurement",
         "original_unit" = "Result_Quantity_Unit",
         "original_circumference" = "Result_Quantity_Value") |> 
  mutate(circumference_datetime = case_when(is.na(Result_DateTime) & is.na(StartDateTime) ~ ymd_hms(EndDateTime),
                                     is.na(Result_DateTime) ~ ymd_hms(StartDateTime),
                                     TRUE ~ ymd_hms(Result_DateTime)),
         circumference_id = gsub(".*CircumferenceMeasurement-", "", circumference_id),
         original_unit = factor(original_unit),
         circumference_cm = case_when(original_unit == "cm" ~ original_circumference,
                               original_unit == "m" ~ original_circumference*100),
         age_days_circumference = as.integer(difftime(circumference_datetime, birth_date, units = c("days"))),
         age_years_circumference = age_days_circumference/365.25,
         sex = case_when(sex == "Female" ~ "f",
                         sex == "Male" ~ "m"),
         bodysite = factor(BodySite_Code_Label)) |> 
  select(hospital, participant_id, birth_date, sex, case_id, case_carehandling, case_admission_datetime, case_discharge_datetime, case_duration_hours, case_duration_days, age_days_case_admission, age_years_case_admission, age_days_case_discharge, age_years_case_discharge, circumference_id, circumference_datetime, bodysite, original_circumference, original_unit, circumference_cm, age_days_circumference, age_years_circumference)
```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add visit day

data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(participant_id, case_id, visit_day_id, visit_day_start_datetime, visit_day_end_datetime, age_years_visit_day_start, age_years_visit_day_end, visit_day_type) |> rename("case_id_visit_day" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable visit
# Because circumferences should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an visit, we keep one healthcare visit in the following order
## time of circumference between visit start and visit end & same case_id
## time of circumference within -1 or 30 days after visit start & same case_id
## time of circumference closest -1 or XX days after visit start & same case_id
## time of circumference closest to visit start & same case_id
## time of circumference between visit start and visit end
## time of circumference within -1 or 30 days after visit start
## time of circumference closest -1 or XX days after visit start
## time of circumference closest to visit start

data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  mutate(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(circumference_datetime, visit_day_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_visit_day_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(circumference_datetime, visit_day_start_datetime, units = "days")),
         visit_day_type = factor(visit_day_type, levels = c("Inpatient stay", "Outpatient visit", "ER visit")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_visit_day) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_visit_day ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_visit_day ~ FALSE),
         visit_day_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           circumference_datetime >= visit_day_start_datetime & circumference_datetime <= visit_day_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - visit_day time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_day_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest visit_day before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest visit_day and same case_id",
           circumference_datetime >= visit_day_start_datetime & circumference_datetime <= visit_day_end_datetime ~ "5 - visit_day time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_day_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_day_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest visit_day before record not same case_id",
           !is.na(time_after_visit_day_start_days) ~ "8 - closest visit_day not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "9 - same participant not same case_id no time"), levels = c("1 - visit_day time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest visit_day before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest visit_day and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - visit_day time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest visit_day within 30 days before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "7 - closest visit_day before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest visit_day not same case_id",
                                                                        "9 - same participant not same case_id no time")),
         time_abs_after_visit_day_start = abs(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(circumference_id) |> 
  arrange(visit_day_link_quality, time_abs_after_visit_day_start, visit_day_type, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(time_after_visit_day_start_minutes, time_after_visit_day_start_days, time_abs_after_visit_day_start, same_case))


data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  mutate(visit_day_link_quality = case_when(is.na(visit_day_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality))

```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add visit week

data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(participant_id, case_id, visit_week_id, visit_week_start_datetime, visit_week_end_datetime, age_years_visit_week_start, age_years_visit_week_end, visit_week_type) |> rename("case_id_visit_week" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable visit
# Because diagnoses should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an visit, we keep one healthcare visit in the following order
## time of circumference between visit start and visit end & same case_id
## time of circumference within -1 or 30 days after visit start & same case_id
## time of circumference closest -1 or XX days after visit start & same case_id
## time of circumference closest to visit start & same case_id
## time of circumference between visit start and visit end
## time of circumference within -1 or 30 days after visit start
## time of circumference closest -1 or XX days after visit start
## time of circumference closest to visit start

data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  mutate(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(circumference_datetime, visit_week_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_visit_week_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(circumference_datetime, visit_week_start_datetime, units = "weeks")),
         visit_week_type = factor(visit_week_type, levels = c("Inpatient stay", "Outpatient visit", "ER visit")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_visit_week) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_visit_week ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_visit_week ~ FALSE),
         visit_week_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           circumference_datetime >= visit_week_start_datetime & circumference_datetime <= visit_week_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - visit_week time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_week_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest visit_week before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest visit_week and same case_id",
           circumference_datetime >= visit_week_start_datetime & circumference_datetime <= visit_week_end_datetime ~ "5 - visit_week time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 & time_after_visit_week_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_visit_week_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest visit_week before record not same case_id",
           !is.na(time_after_visit_week_start_days) ~ "8 - closest visit_week not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "9 - same participant not same case_id no time"), levels = c("1 - visit_week time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest visit_week before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest visit_week and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - visit_week time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest visit_week within 30 days before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "7 - closest visit_week before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest visit_week not same case_id",
                                                                        "9 - same participant not same case_id no time")),
         time_abs_after_visit_week_start = abs(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(circumference_id) |> 
  arrange(visit_week_link_quality, time_abs_after_visit_week_start, visit_week_type, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(time_after_visit_week_start_minutes, time_after_visit_week_start_days, time_abs_after_visit_week_start, same_case))


data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  mutate(visit_week_link_quality = case_when(is.na(visit_week_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality))

```


```{r, message = FALSE}
# Add healthcare encounter

data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(participant_id, case_id, encounter_id, encounter_specialty, encounter_origin_location_name, encounter_origin_location_code, encounter_current_location_name, encounter_current_location_code, encounter_target_location_name, encounter_target_location_code, encounter_start_datetime, encounter_end_datetime, encounter_duration_minutes,  encounter_duration_hours, encounter_duration_days, age_days_encounter_start, age_years_encounter_start, age_days_encounter_end, age_years_encounter_end, encounter_carehandling) |> rename("case_id_encounter" = "case_id"), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")

# Keep the most suitable healthcare encounter
# Because diagnoses should be recorded during or in a reasonable time after an encounter, we keep one healthcare encounter in the following order
## time of circumference between encounter start and encounter end & same case_id
## time of circumference within -1 or 30 days after encounter start & same case_id
## time of circumference closest -1 or XX days after encounter start & same case_id
## time of circumference closest to encounter start & same case_id
## time of circumference between encounter start and encounter end
## time of circumference within -1 or 30 days after encounter start
## time of circumference closest -1 or XX days after encounter start
## time of circumference closest to encounter start

data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  mutate(time_after_encounter_start_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(circumference_datetime, encounter_start_datetime, units = "mins")),
         time_after_encounter_start_days = as.numeric(difftime(circumference_datetime, encounter_start_datetime, units = "days")),
         encounter_carehandling = factor(encounter_carehandling, levels = c("Inpatient encounter", "Outpatient encounter", "ER encounter")),
         same_case = case_when(is.na(case_id) | is.na(case_id_encounter) ~ FALSE,
                               case_id == case_id_encounter ~ TRUE,
                               case_id != case_id_encounter ~ FALSE),
         encounter_link_quality = factor(case_when(
           circumference_datetime >= encounter_start_datetime & circumference_datetime <= encounter_end_datetime & same_case ~ "1 - encounter time includes record and same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & time_after_encounter_start_days <= 30 & same_case ~ "2 - closest encounter within 30 days before record and same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & same_case ~ "3 - closest encounter before record and same case_id",
           same_case  ~ "4 - closest encounter and same case_id",
           circumference_datetime >= encounter_start_datetime & circumference_datetime <= encounter_end_datetime ~ "5 - encounter time includes record not same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 & time_after_encounter_start_days <= 30 ~ "6 - closest encounter within 30 days before record not same case_id",
           time_after_encounter_start_days >=-1 ~ "7 - closest encounter before record not same case_id",
           !is.na(time_after_encounter_start_days) ~ "8 - closest encounter not same case_id",
           TRUE ~ "9 - same participant not same case_id no time"), levels = c("1 - encounter time includes record and same case_id",
                                                                        "2 - closest encounter within 30 days before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "3 - closest encounter before record and same case_id",
                                                                        "4 - closest encounter and same case_id",
                                                                        "5 - encounter time includes record not same case_id",
                                                                        "6 - closest encounter within 30 days before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "7 - closest encounter before record not same case_id",
                                                                        "8 - closest encounter not same case_id",
                                                                        "9 - same participant not same case_id no time")),
         time_abs_after_encounter_start = abs(time_after_encounter_start_minutes)) |> 
  group_by(circumference_id) |> 
  arrange(encounter_link_quality, time_abs_after_encounter_start, encounter_carehandling, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(-c(same_case, time_after_encounter_start_minutes, time_after_encounter_start_days, time_abs_after_encounter_start))


data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  mutate(encounter_link_quality = case_when(is.na(encounter_id) ~ NA,
                                            TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality))


```


Check circumference data

```{r, message = FALSE}

data_circumference |> select(hospital, participant_id, sex, case_id, case_admission_datetime, visit_day_id, visit_day_link_quality, visit_day_start_datetime, visit_week_id, visit_week_link_quality, visit_week_start_datetime, encounter_id, encounter_link_quality, encounter_start_datetime, circumference_id, circumference_datetime, original_circumference, original_unit, circumference_cm, bodysite, age_days_circumference, age_years_circumference) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = "hospital",
              type = c("participant_id", "case_id", "visit_day_id", "visit_week_id", "encounter_id", "circumference_id") ~ "continuous2",
              statistic = list(
                all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({min}, {max})",
                all_continuous2() ~ "{N_obs}"
                ),
              missing = "always",
              missing_stat = "{N_miss} ({p_miss}%)") |> 
  add_overall()

cat("number of circumference id's:", data_circumference |> nrow(), "\n")
cat("number of distinct circumference id's:", data_circumference |> distinct(circumference_id) |>  nrow(), "\n")



```



```{r}

rm(data_circumference_sphn2025.2)

```


Split circumferences into head, waist, hip, neck

```{r}

data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
    mutate(bodysite = case_when(hospital == "Universitäts-Kinderspital Zürich - Eleonorenstiftung" ~ "Head structure",
                              TRUE ~ bodysite))

data_head <- data_circumference |> 
  filter(bodysite == "Head structure") |> 
  mutate(head_cm = circumference_cm)

data_waist <- data_circumference |> 
  filter(bodysite == "Structure of waist" | bodysite == "Structure of waist (surface region)" | bodysite == "Abdomen") |> 
  mutate(waist_cm = circumference_cm)

data_hip <- data_circumference |> 
  filter(bodysite == "Hip region structure") |> 
  mutate(hip_cm = circumference_cm)

data_neck <- data_circumference |> 
  filter(bodysite == "Neck structure") |> 
  mutate(hip_cm = circumference_cm)

```



## Self developed algorithm

### Calculate z-scores
Functions to calculate z-scores

```{r}

# function for correct rounding
round2 = function(x, digits=0) {
  posneg = sign(x)
  z = abs(x)*10^digits
  z = z + 0.5 + sqrt(.Machine$double.eps)
  z = trunc(z)
  z = z/10^digits
  z*posneg
}

# function to calculate corrected z-scores as described by the WHO. See computation_who.pdf -----

z_score_calc_corr = function(L,M,S,parameter){
  if(is.na(L)|is.na(M)|is.na(S)|is.na(parameter)|parameter<=0){
    return(NA)
  }
  z_score = ((parameter/M)^L-1)/(S*L)
  if (z_score > 3){
    SD3pos = M*(1+S*L*3)^(1/L)
    SD2pos = M*(1+S*L*2)^(1/L)
    SD23pos = SD3pos - SD2pos
    z_score = 3+((parameter-SD3pos)/SD23pos)
    return(z_score)
  } else if (z_score < -3){
    SD3neg = M*(1+S*L*(-3))^(1/L)
    SD2neg = M*(1+S*L*(-2))^(1/L)
    SD23neg = SD2neg - SD3neg
    z_score = -3+((parameter-SD3neg)/SD23neg)
    return(z_score)
  } else{
    return(z_score)
  }
}

```

```{r}

interpolated_braegger_height <- interpolated_braegger_height |> 
  bind_rows(braegger_length)

```



Height

```{r}
# calculate height z-score based on braegger reference -----

data_height <- data_height %>% 
  mutate(age_days_z = as.integer(case_when(age_days_height < 0 ~ NA,
                                age_days_height > 6940 ~ 6940,
                                TRUE ~ age_days_height)))

# add L,M,S values of height braegger reference to each individual
data_height <- left_join(x=data_height, y=interpolated_braegger_height, by = c('age_days_z' = "age_days",'sex' = "sex"))


# calculate height z scores
data_height = data_height |> 
  rowwise() |> 
  mutate(z_height_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,height_cm)) |> 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values

data_height = data_height |> 
  select(-c("L", "M", "S"))
```

Weight

```{r}
# calculate weight z-score based on braegger reference ---------------------------

data_weight <- data_weight %>% 
  mutate(age_days_z = as.integer(case_when(age_days_weight < 0 ~ NA,
                                age_days_weight > 6575 ~ 6575,
                                TRUE ~ age_days_weight)))

# add L,M,S values of weight braegger reference to each individual
data_weight <- left_join(x=data_weight, y=interpolated_braegger_weight, by = c('age_days_z' = "age_days",'sex'="sex"))

# calculate weight z scores
data_weight <- data_weight %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_weight_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,weight_kg)) |> 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
data_weight = data_weight %>% 
  select(-c("L", "M", "S"))

```


Head

```{r}
# calculate head z-score based on braegger reference ---------------------------

data_head <- data_head %>% 
  mutate(age_days_z = as.integer(case_when(age_days_circumference < 0 ~ NA,
                                age_days_circumference > 6575 ~ 6575,
                                TRUE ~ age_days_circumference)))

# add L,M,S values of head braegger reference to each individual
data_head <- left_join(x=data_head, y=interpolated_braegger_head_circumference, by = c('age_days_z' = "age_days",'sex'="sex"))

# calculate head z scores
data_head <- data_head %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_head_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,head_cm)) |> 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
data_head = data_head %>% 
  select(-c("L", "M", "S"))

```


### Save original

```{r}

data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(original_height_cm = height_cm,
         original_z_height = z_height_braegger)

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(original_weight_kg = weight_kg,
         original_z_weight = z_weight_braegger)

data_head <- data_head |> 
  mutate(original_head_cm = head_cm,
         original_z_head = z_head_braegger)

```


### Missing z-score

```{r}

data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when(is.na(z_height_braegger) & is.na(height_cm) ~ "Missing-height",
                                      is.na(z_height_braegger) & is.na(age_days_height) ~ "Missing-age",
                                      is.na(z_height_braegger) & is.na(sex) ~ "Missing-sex",
                                      is.na(z_height_braegger) & height_cm <= 0 ~ "Zero-or-negative-height",
                                      is.na(z_height_braegger) & age_days_height < 0 ~ "Negative-age",
                                      is.na(z_height_braegger) == FALSE ~ "Include"))

data_height |> 
  select(manual_result) |> 
  tbl_summary()


data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when(is.na(z_weight_braegger) & is.na(weight_kg) ~ "Missing-weight",
                                      is.na(z_weight_braegger) & is.na(age_days_weight) ~ "Missing-age",
                                      is.na(z_weight_braegger) & is.na(sex) ~ "Missing-sex",
                                      is.na(z_weight_braegger) & weight_kg <= 0 ~ "Zero-or-negative-weight",
                                      is.na(z_weight_braegger) & age_days_weight < 0 ~ "Negative-age",
                                      is.na(z_weight_braegger) == FALSE ~ "Include"))

data_weight |> 
  select(manual_result) |> 
  tbl_summary()

data_head <- data_head |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when(is.na(z_head_braegger) & is.na(head_cm) ~ "Missing-circumference",
                                      is.na(z_head_braegger) & is.na(age_days_circumference) ~ "Missing-age",
                                      is.na(z_head_braegger) & is.na(sex) ~ "Missing-sex",
                                      is.na(z_head_braegger) & head_cm <= 0 ~ "Zero-or-negative-circumference",
                                      is.na(z_head_braegger) & age_days_circumference < 0 ~ "Negative-age",
                                      is.na(z_head_braegger) == FALSE ~ "Include"))

data_head |> 
  select(manual_result) |> 
  tbl_summary()


```


### Swapped height and weight recordings

Height

```{r}

data_height <- data_height %>% 
  mutate(weight_kg = height_cm) |> 
  mutate(age_days_z_weight = as.integer(case_when(age_days_height < 0 ~ NA,
                                age_days_height > 6575 ~ 6575,
                                TRUE ~ age_days_height)))

# add L,M,S values of height braegger reference to each individual
data_height <- left_join(x=data_height, y=interpolated_braegger_weight, by = c('age_days_z_weight' = "age_days",'sex' = "sex"))


# calculate height z scores
data_height = data_height %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_weight_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,weight_kg)) |> 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
exclude_col = c("L","M","S")

data_height = data_height %>% 
  select(-exclude_col)

data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when(manual_result == "Include"
                                   & abs(z_height_braegger) > 10
                                   & abs(z_height_braegger) > abs(z_weight_braegger)
                                   & z_weight_braegger > (-5) & z_weight_braegger < 8
                                   ~ "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result))

data_height |> 
  select(manual_result) |> 
  tbl_summary()

# correct swapped recordings

data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(height_cm = case_when(manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight" ~ NA,
                               TRUE ~ height_cm),
         z_height_braegger = case_when(manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight" ~ NA,
                               TRUE ~ z_height_braegger),
         weight_kg = case_when(manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight" ~ weight_kg,
                               TRUE ~ NA),
         z_weight_braegger = case_when(manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight" ~ z_weight_braegger,
                               TRUE ~ NA)) |> 
  select(-c(age_days_z_weight))
  

```

Weight

```{r}

data_weight <- data_weight %>% 
  mutate(height_cm = weight_kg) |> 
  mutate(age_days_z_height = as.integer(case_when(age_days_weight < 0 ~ NA,
                                age_days_weight > 6940 ~ 6940,
                                TRUE ~ age_days_weight)))

# add L,M,S values of weight braegger reference to each individual
data_weight <- left_join(x=data_weight, y=interpolated_braegger_height, by = c('age_days_z_height' = "age_days",'sex' = "sex"))


# calculate weight z scores
data_weight = data_weight %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_height_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,height_cm)) |> 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
exclude_col = c("L","M","S")

data_weight = data_weight %>% 
  select(-exclude_col)

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when(manual_result == "Include"
                                   & abs(z_weight_braegger) > 10
                                   & abs(z_weight_braegger) > abs(z_height_braegger)
                                   & z_height_braegger > (-5) & z_height_braegger < 5
                                   ~ "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result))

data_weight |> 
  select(manual_result) |> 
  tbl_summary()

# correct swapped recordings

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(weight_kg = case_when(manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height" ~ NA,
                               TRUE ~ weight_kg),
         z_weight_braegger = case_when(manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height" ~ NA,
                               TRUE ~ z_weight_braegger),
         height_cm = case_when(manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height" ~ height_cm,
                               TRUE ~ NA),
         z_height_braegger = case_when(manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height" ~ z_height_braegger,
                               TRUE ~ NA)) |> 
  select(-c(age_days_z_height))
  

```

### Unit errors

Height

```{r}

data_height <- data_height %>% 
  mutate(height_low = height_cm*100,
         height_high = height_cm/100)

# add L,M,S values of height braegger reference to each individual
data_height <- left_join(x=data_height, y=interpolated_braegger_height, by = c('age_days_z' = "age_days",'sex' = "sex"))


# calculate height z scores
data_height = data_height %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_height_low_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,height_low),
         z_height_high_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,height_high)) |> 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
exclude_col = c("L","M","S")

data_height = data_height %>% 
  select(-exclude_col)

data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when(manual_result == "Include"
                                   & abs(z_height_braegger) > 10
                                   & abs(z_height_braegger) > abs(z_height_low_braegger)
                                   & abs(z_height_low_braegger) < 5
                                   ~ "Unit-Error-Low",
                                   manual_result == "Include"
                                   & abs(z_height_braegger) > 10
                                   & abs(z_height_braegger) > abs(z_height_high_braegger)
                                   & abs(z_height_high_braegger) < 5
                                   ~ "Unit-Error-High",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result))

data_height |> 
  select(manual_result) |> 
  tbl_summary()

# correct unit errors

data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(height_cm = case_when(manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low" ~ height_low,
                               manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" ~ height_high,
                               TRUE ~ height_cm),
         z_height_braegger = case_when(manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low" ~ z_height_low_braegger,
                               manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" ~ z_height_high_braegger,
                               TRUE ~ z_height_braegger)) |> 
  select(-c(height_high, height_low, z_height_low_braegger, z_height_high_braegger))

```

Weight

```{r}

data_weight <- data_weight %>% 
  mutate(weight_low = weight_kg*1000,
         weight_high = weight_kg/1000)

# add L,M,S values of weight braegger reference to each individual
data_weight <- left_join(x=data_weight, y=interpolated_braegger_weight, by = c('age_days_z' = "age_days",'sex' = "sex"))


# calculate weight z scores
data_weight = data_weight %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_weight_low_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,weight_low),
         z_weight_high_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,weight_high)) |> 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
exclude_col = c("L","M","S")

data_weight = data_weight %>% 
  select(-exclude_col)

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when(manual_result == "Include"
                                & abs(z_weight_braegger) > 10
                                & abs(z_weight_braegger) > abs(z_weight_low_braegger)
                                & z_weight_low_braegger > (-5) & z_weight_low_braegger < 8
                                ~ "Unit-Error-Low",
                                manual_result == "Include"
                                & abs(z_weight_braegger) > 10
                                & abs(z_weight_braegger) > abs(z_weight_high_braegger)
                                & z_weight_high_braegger > (-5) & z_weight_high_braegger < 8
                                ~ "Unit-Error-High",
                                TRUE ~ manual_result))

data_weight |> 
  select(manual_result) |> 
  tbl_summary()

# correct unit errors

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(weight_kg = case_when(manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low" ~ weight_low,
                               manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" ~ weight_high,
                               TRUE ~ weight_kg),
         z_weight_braegger = case_when(manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low" ~ z_weight_low_braegger,
                               manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" ~ z_weight_high_braegger,
                               TRUE ~ z_weight_braegger)) |> 
  select(-c(weight_high, weight_low, z_weight_low_braegger, z_weight_high_braegger))

```


Head

```{r}

data_head <- data_head %>% 
  mutate(head_low = head_cm*100,
         head_high = head_cm/100)

# add L,M,S values of head braegger reference to each individual
data_head <- left_join(x=data_head, y=interpolated_braegger_head_circumference, by = c('age_days_z' = "age_days",'sex' = "sex"))


# calculate head z scores
data_head = data_head %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_head_low_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,head_low),
         z_head_high_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,head_high)) |> 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
exclude_col = c("L","M","S")

data_head = data_head %>% 
  select(-exclude_col)

data_head <- data_head |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when(manual_result == "Include"
                                & abs(z_head_braegger) > 10
                                & abs(z_head_braegger) > abs(z_head_low_braegger)
                                & abs(z_head_low_braegger) < 5
                                ~ "Unit-Error-Low",
                                manual_result == "Include"
                                & abs(z_head_braegger) > 10
                                & abs(z_head_braegger) > abs(z_head_high_braegger)
                                & abs(z_head_high_braegger) < 5
                                ~ "Unit-Error-High",
                                TRUE ~ manual_result))

data_head |> 
  select(manual_result) |> 
  tbl_summary()

# correct unit errors

data_head <- data_head |> 
  mutate(head_cm = case_when(manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low" ~ head_low,
                               manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" ~ head_high,
                               TRUE ~ head_cm),
         z_head_braegger = case_when(manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low" ~ z_head_low_braegger,
                               manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" ~ z_head_high_braegger,
                               TRUE ~ z_head_braegger)) |> 
  select(-c(head_high, head_low, z_head_low_braegger, z_head_high_braegger))

```



### Decimal errors

Height

```{r}

data_height <- data_height %>% 
  mutate(height_low = height_cm*10,
         height_high = height_cm/10)

# add L,M,S values of height braegger reference to each individual
data_height <- left_join(x=data_height, y=interpolated_braegger_height, by = c('age_days_z' = "age_days",'sex' = "sex"))


# calculate height z scores
data_height = data_height %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_height_low_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,height_low),
         z_height_high_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,height_high)) |> 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
exclude_col = c("L","M","S")

data_height = data_height %>% 
  select(-exclude_col)

data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when(manual_result == "Include"
                                   & abs(z_height_braegger) > 10
                                   & abs(z_height_braegger) > abs(z_height_low_braegger)
                                   & abs(z_height_low_braegger) < 5
                                   ~ "Decimal-Error-Low",
                                   manual_result == "manual_result"
                                   & abs(z_height_braegger) > 10
                                   & abs(z_height_braegger) > abs(z_height_high_braegger)
                                   & abs(z_height_high_braegger) < 5
                                   ~ "Decimal-Error-High",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result))

data_height |> 
  select(manual_result) |> 
  tbl_summary()

# correct unit errors

data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(height_cm = case_when(manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low" ~ height_low,
                               manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" ~ height_high,
                               TRUE ~ height_cm),
         z_height_braegger = case_when(manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low" ~ z_height_low_braegger,
                               manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" ~ z_height_high_braegger,
                               TRUE ~ z_height_braegger)) |> 
  select(-c(height_high, height_low, z_height_low_braegger, z_height_high_braegger))

```

Weight

```{r}

data_weight <- data_weight %>% 
  mutate(weight_low1 = weight_kg*10,
         weight_low2 = weight_kg*100,
         weight_high1 = weight_kg/10,
         weight_high2 = weight_kg/100)

# add L,M,S values of weight braegger reference to each individual
data_weight <- left_join(x=data_weight, y=interpolated_braegger_weight, by = c('age_days_z' = "age_days",'sex' = "sex"))


# calculate weight z scores
data_weight = data_weight %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_weight_low1_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,weight_low1),
         z_weight_low2_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,weight_low2),
         z_weight_high1_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,weight_high1),
         z_weight_high2_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,weight_high2)) |> 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
exclude_col = c("L","M","S")

data_weight = data_weight %>% 
  select(-exclude_col)

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when(manual_result == "Include"
                                   & abs(z_weight_braegger) > 10
                                   & abs(z_weight_braegger) > abs(z_weight_low1_braegger)
                                   & z_weight_low1_braegger > (-5) & z_weight_low1_braegger < 8
                                   ~ "Decimal-Error-Low1",
                                   manual_result == "Include"
                                   & abs(z_weight_braegger) > 10
                                   & abs(z_weight_braegger) > abs(z_weight_low2_braegger)
                                   & z_weight_low2_braegger > (-5) & z_weight_low2_braegger < 8 
                                   ~ "Decimal-Error-Low2",
                                   manual_result == "Include"
                                   & abs(z_weight_braegger) > 10
                                   & abs(z_weight_braegger) > abs(z_weight_high1_braegger)
                                   & z_weight_high1_braegger > (-5) & z_weight_high1_braegger < 8
                                   ~ "Decimal-Error-High1",
                                   manual_result == "Include"
                                   & abs(z_weight_braegger) > 10
                                   & abs(z_weight_braegger) > abs(z_weight_high2_braegger)
                                   & z_weight_high2_braegger > (-5) & z_weight_high2_braegger < 8
                                   ~ "Decimal-Error-High2",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result))

data_weight |> 
  select(manual_result) |> 
  tbl_summary()

# correct unit errors

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(weight_kg = case_when(manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low1" ~ weight_low1,
                               manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low2" ~ weight_low2,
                               manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High1" ~ weight_high1,
                               manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High2" ~ weight_high2,
                               manual_result == "No-Decimal-Error" ~ weight_kg,
                               TRUE ~ weight_kg),
         z_weight_braegger = case_when(manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low1" ~ z_weight_low1_braegger,
                                       manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low2" ~ z_weight_low2_braegger,
                                       manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High1" ~ z_weight_high1_braegger,
                                       manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High2" ~ z_weight_high2_braegger,
                                       manual_result == "No-Decimal-Error" ~ z_weight_braegger,
                                       TRUE ~ z_weight_braegger)) |> 
  select(-c( weight_low1,  weight_low2, weight_high1, weight_high2, z_weight_low1_braegger, z_weight_low2_braegger, z_weight_high1_braegger, z_weight_high2_braegger))

```

Head

```{r}

data_head <- data_head %>% 
  mutate(head_low = head_cm*10,
         head_high = head_cm/10)

# add L,M,S values of head braegger reference to each individual
data_head <- left_join(x=data_head, y=interpolated_braegger_head_circumference, by = c('age_days_z' = "age_days",'sex' = "sex"))


# calculate head z scores
data_head = data_head %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_head_low_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,head_low),
         z_head_high_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,head_high)) |> 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
exclude_col = c("L","M","S")

data_head = data_head %>% 
  select(-exclude_col)

data_head <- data_head |>
```
