```{r}
  mutate(manual_result = case_when(manual_result == "Include"
                                   & abs(z_head_braegger) > 10
                                   & abs(z_head_braegger) > abs(z_head_low_braegger)
                                   & abs(z_head_low_braegger) < 5
                                   ~ "Decimal-Error-Low",
                                   manual_result == "Include"
                                   & abs(z_head_braegger) > 10
                                   & abs(z_head_braegger) > abs(z_head_high_braegger)
                                   & abs(z_head_high_braegger) < 5
                                   ~ "Decimal-Error-High",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result))

data_head |> 
  select(manual_result) |> 
  tbl_summary()

# correct unit errors

data_head <- data_head |> 
  mutate(head_cm = case_when(manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low" ~ head_low,
                               manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" ~ head_high,
                               TRUE ~ head_cm),
         z_head_braegger = case_when(manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low" ~ z_head_low_braegger,
                               manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" ~ z_head_high_braegger,
                               TRUE ~ z_head_braegger)) |> 
  select(-c(head_high, head_low, z_head_low_braegger, z_head_high_braegger))

```


### Z-score outliers

Height

```{r}

data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when((manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low")
                                   & z_height_braegger < -5
                                   ~ "Exclude - Z-Score",
                                   (manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low")
                                   & z_height_braegger > 5
                                   ~ "Exclude - Z-Score",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result))

```

Weight

```{r}

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when((manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High1" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High2" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low1" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low2")
                                   & z_weight_braegger < -5
                                   ~ "Exclude - Z-Score",
                                   (manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High1" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High2" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low1" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low2")
                                   & z_weight_braegger > 8
                                   ~ "Exclude - Z-Score",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result))

```

Head

```{r}

data_head <- data_head |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when((manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low")
                                   & z_head_braegger < -5
                                   ~ "Exclude - Z-Score",
                                   (manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low")
                                   & z_head_braegger > 5
                                   ~ "Exclude - Z-Score",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result))

```


### Carried Forward

Height

```{r}

data_height <- data_height |> 
  group_by(participant_id, original_height) |> 
  arrange(height_datetime) |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when((manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low")
                                   & row_number() >= 2
                                   & min(date(height_datetime)) != date(height_datetime) ~ "Carried-Forward",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result)) |> 
  ungroup()

```

Weight

```{r}

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  group_by(participant_id, original_weight) |> 
  arrange(weight_datetime) |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when((manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High1" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High2" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low1" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low2")
                                   & row_number() >= 2
                                   & min(date(weight_datetime)) != date(weight_datetime)  ~ "Carried-Forward",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result)) |> 
  ungroup()

```

Head

```{r}

data_head <- data_head |> 
  group_by(participant_id, original_circumference) |> 
  arrange(circumference_datetime) |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when((manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low")
                                   & row_number() >= 2
                                   & min(date(circumference_datetime)) != date(circumference_datetime) ~ "Carried-Forward",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result)) |> 
  ungroup()

```



### Same day

Height

```{r}

data_height <- data_height |> 
  group_by(participant_id, date(height_datetime)) |> 
  arrange(height_datetime) |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when((manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low")
                                   & min(abs(z_height_braegger)) != abs(z_height_braegger)
                                   ~ "Same-Day",
                                   (manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low")
                                   & min(abs(z_height_braegger)) == abs(z_height_braegger)
                                   & row_number() >= 2
                                   ~ "Same-Day",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result)) |> 
  ungroup()

```

Weight

```{r}

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  group_by(participant_id, date(weight_datetime)) |> 
  arrange(weight_datetime) |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when((manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High1" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High2" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low1" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low2")
                                   & min(abs(z_weight_braegger)) != abs(z_weight_braegger)
                                   ~ "Same-Day",
                                   (manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High1" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High2" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low1" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low2")
                                   & min(abs(z_weight_braegger)) == abs(z_weight_braegger)
                                   & row_number() >= 2
                                   ~ "Same-Day",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result)) |> 
  ungroup()

```

Head circumference

```{r}

data_head <- data_head |> 
  group_by(participant_id, date(circumference_datetime)) |> 
  arrange(circumference_datetime) |> 
  mutate(manual_result = case_when((manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low")
                                   & min(abs(z_head_braegger)) != abs(z_head_braegger)
                                   ~ "Same-Day",
                                   (manual_result == "Include"
                                   | manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low"
                                   | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low")
                                   & min(abs(z_head_braegger)) == abs(z_head_braegger)
                                   & row_number() >= 2
                                   ~ "Same-Day",
                                   TRUE ~ manual_result)) |> 
  ungroup()

```


### Print manual result

```{r}

data_height |> 
  select(manual_result) |> 
  tbl_summary()


data_weight |> 
  select(manual_result) |> 
  tbl_summary()


data_head |> 
  select(manual_result) |> 
  tbl_summary()


```


## Growthcleanr
Prepare data for growthcleanr

```{r}

data_height_1 <- data_height |> 
  mutate(param = case_when(age_days_height < 730 ~ "LENGTHCM",
                           age_days_height >= 730 ~ "HEIGHTCM",
                           TRUE ~ "HEIGHTCM"),
         measurement = original_height_cm) |> 
  rename("measurement_id" = "height_id") |> 
  mutate(age_days = as.integer(age_days_height)) |> 
  select(participant_id, measurement_id, param, age_days, sex, measurement)

data_weight_1 <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(param = "WEIGHTKG",
         measurement = original_weight_kg) |> 
  rename("measurement_id" = "weight_id") |> 
  mutate(age_days = as.integer(age_days_weight)) |> 
  select(participant_id, measurement_id, param, age_days, sex, measurement)

data_before_growthcleanr <- rbind(data_height_1, data_weight_1)

data_before_growthcleanr <- data_before_growthcleanr |> 
  drop_na()



rm(data_height_1, data_weight_1)

```

Run growthcleanr

```{r}
gc()

data <- as.data.table(data_before_growthcleanr)

data_after_growthcleanr <- data[, gcr_result := cleangrowth(subjid = participant_id, param, agedays = age_days, sex = sex, measurement = measurement, sd.recenter = "derive", include.carryforward = FALSE,  parallel = TRUE, ref.data.path = "/project/home/leuenberger_lorenz/Documents/Data-analyses/Growth-references/data/growthcleanr_braegger/")]

rm(data)

```

```{r}

save(data_after_growthcleanr, file = here("data","processed","data_after_growthcleanr.RData"))

#load(here("data", "processed", "data_after_growthcleanr.RData"))

```


Growthcleanr results

```{r}

data_after_growthcleanr |> 
  select(param, gcr_result) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = "param") |> 
  add_overall()


data_after_growthcleanr <- data_after_growthcleanr |> 
  mutate(growthcleanr_result = case_when(
    is.na(gcr_result) | gcr_result == "Missing" ~ "Missing",
    gcr_result == "Include" ~ "Include",
    gcr_result == "Unit-Error-Low" | gcr_result == "Unit-Error-High" | gcr_result == "Unit-Error-Possible" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Unit-Errors" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Unit-Errors-RV" ~ "Unit-Error",
    gcr_result == "Swapped-Measurements" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Swapped-Measurements" ~ "Swapped-Measurements",
    gcr_result == "Exclude-Extraneous-Same-Day" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Temporary-Extraneous-Same-Day" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Identical-Same-Day" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Extraneous-Same-Day"  ~ "Same-Day",
    gcr_result == "Exclude-Carried-Forward" ~ "Carried-Forward",
    gcr_result == "Exclude-SD-Cutoff" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-BIV" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Weight-Cap" ~ "Exclude - Extreme-Outlier",
    gcr_result == "Exclude-Single-Outlier" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Distinct-Single" ~ "Single-Outlier",
    gcr_result == "Exclude-EWMA-Extreme" | gcr_result == "Exclude-EWMA-Extreme-Pair" | gcr_result == "Exclude-EWMA-8" | gcr_result == "Exclude-EWMA-9" | gcr_result == "Exclude-EWMA-10" | gcr_result == "Exclude-EWMA-11" | gcr_result == "Exclude-EWMA-12" | gcr_result == "Exclude-EWMA-13" | gcr_result == "Exclude-EWMA-14" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Min-Height-Change" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Max-Height-Change" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Pair-Delta-17" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Pair-Delta-18" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Pair-Delta-19" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Too-Many-Errors" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Too-Many-Errors-Other-Parameter" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Hundreds" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Hundreds-RV" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Transpositions" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Transpositions-RV" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Distinct-Pairs" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Distinct-3-Or-More" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-EWMA-Extreme" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-EWMA-Extreme-RV" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Distinct-Ordered-Pairs" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-EWMA-Moderate" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Possibly-Impacted-By-Weight-Cap" | gcr_result == "Exclude-Adult-Too-Many-Errors" ~ "Longitudinal-Outlier",
                            TRUE ~ NA),
         param = case_when(param == "HEIGHTCM" ~ "HEIGHT",
                           param == "LENGTHCM" ~ "HEIGHT",
                           param == "WEIGHTKG" ~ "WEIGHT"))

data_after_growthcleanr |> 
  select(param, gcr_result) |>
  tbl_summary(by = "param") |> 
  add_overall()

data_after_growthcleanr |> 
  select(param, growthcleanr_result) |>
  tbl_summary(by = "param") |> 
  add_overall()

```

Add result of growthcleanr to anthropometric data

```{r}

data_height <- data_height |> 
  left_join(data_after_growthcleanr |> select(measurement_id, gcr_result, growthcleanr_result) |> rename("height_id" = "measurement_id"), by = "height_id")

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  left_join(data_after_growthcleanr |> select(measurement_id, gcr_result, growthcleanr_result)|> rename("weight_id" = "measurement_id"), by = "weight_id")

```




## Combined: Self developed & Growthcleanr
Prepare data for growthcleanr

```{r}

data_height_1 <- data_height |> 
  mutate(param = case_when(manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight" ~ "WEIGHTKG",
                           age_days_height < 730 ~ "LENGTHCM",
                           age_days_height >= 730 ~ "HEIGHTCM",
                           TRUE ~ "HEIGHTCM"),
         measurement = case_when(manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight" ~ weight_kg,
                                 TRUE ~ height_cm)) |> 
  rename("measurement_id" = "height_id") |> 
  mutate(age_days = as.integer(age_days_height)) |> 
  select(participant_id, measurement_id, param, age_days, sex, measurement)

data_weight_1 <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(param = case_when(manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height" & age_days_weight < 730 ~ "LENGTHCM",
                           manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height" & age_days_weight >= 730 ~ "HEIGHTCM",
                           TRUE ~ "WEIGHTKG"),
         measurement = case_when(manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height" ~ height_cm,
                                 TRUE ~ weight_kg)) |> 
  rename("measurement_id" = "weight_id") |> 
  mutate(age_days = as.integer(age_days_weight)) |> 
  select(participant_id, measurement_id, param, age_days, sex, measurement)

data_before_growthcleanr_combined <- rbind(data_height_1, data_weight_1)

data_before_growthcleanr_combined <- data_before_growthcleanr_combined |> 
  drop_na()

rm(data_height_1, data_weight_1)

```

Run growthcleanr

```{r}
gc()

data <- as.data.table(data_before_growthcleanr_combined)

data_after_growthcleanr_combined <- data[, gcr_result_combined := cleangrowth(subjid = participant_id, param, agedays = age_days, sex = sex, measurement = measurement, sd.recenter = "derive", include.carryforward = FALSE,  parallel = TRUE, ref.data.path = "/project/home/leuenberger_lorenz/Documents/Data-analyses/Growth-references/data/growthcleanr_braegger/")]

rm(data)

```

```{r}

save(data_after_growthcleanr_combined, file = here("data","processed","data_after_growthcleanr_combined.RData"))

#load(here("data", "processed", "data_after_growthcleanr_combined.RData"))

```


Growthcleanr results

```{r}

data_after_growthcleanr_combined |> 
  select(param, gcr_result_combined) |> 
  tbl_summary(by = "param") |> 
  add_overall()


data_after_growthcleanr_combined <- data_after_growthcleanr_combined |> 
  mutate(growthcleanr_result_combined = case_when(
    is.na(gcr_result_combined) | gcr_result_combined == "Missing" ~ "Missing",
    gcr_result_combined == "Include" ~ "Include",
    gcr_result_combined == "Unit-Error-Low" | gcr_result_combined == "Unit-Error-High" | gcr_result_combined == "Unit-Error-Possible" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Unit-Errors" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Unit-Errors-RV" ~ "Unit-Error",
    gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Hundreds" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Hundreds-RV" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Transpositions" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Transpositions-RV" ~ "Corrected-Digit-Error",
    gcr_result_combined == "Swapped-Measurements" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Swapped-Measurements" ~ "Swapped-Measurements",
    gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Extraneous-Same-Day" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Temporary-Extraneous-Same-Day" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Identical-Same-Day" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Extraneous-Same-Day"  ~ "Same-Day",
    gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Carried-Forward" ~ "Carried-Forward",
    gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-SD-Cutoff" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-BIV" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Weight-Cap" ~ "Exclude - Extreme-Outlier",
    gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Single-Outlier" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Distinct-Single" ~ "Single-Outlier",
    gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-EWMA-Extreme" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-EWMA-Extreme-Pair" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-EWMA-8" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-EWMA-9" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-EWMA-10" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-EWMA-11" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-EWMA-12" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-EWMA-13" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-EWMA-14" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Min-Height-Change" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Max-Height-Change" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Pair-Delta-17" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Pair-Delta-18" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Pair-Delta-19" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Too-Many-Errors" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Too-Many-Errors-Other-Parameter" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Distinct-Pairs" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Distinct-3-Or-More" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-EWMA-Extreme" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-EWMA-Extreme-RV" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Distinct-Ordered-Pairs" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-EWMA-Moderate" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Possibly-Impacted-By-Weight-Cap" | gcr_result_combined == "Exclude-Adult-Too-Many-Errors" ~ "Longitudinal-Outlier",
                            TRUE ~ NA),
         param = case_when(param == "HEIGHTCM" ~ "HEIGHT",
                           param == "LENGTHCM" ~ "HEIGHT",
                           param == "WEIGHTKG" ~ "WEIGHT"))

data_after_growthcleanr_combined |> 
  select(param, gcr_result_combined) |>
  tbl_summary(by = "param") |> 
  add_overall()

data_after_growthcleanr_combined |> 
  select(param, growthcleanr_result_combined) |>
  tbl_summary(by = "param") |> 
  add_overall()


```

Add result of growthcleanr to anthropometric data

```{r}

data_height <- data_height |> 
  left_join(data_after_growthcleanr_combined |> select(measurement_id, gcr_result_combined, growthcleanr_result_combined) |> rename("height_id" = "measurement_id"), by = "height_id")

data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  left_join(data_after_growthcleanr_combined |> select(measurement_id, gcr_result_combined, growthcleanr_result_combined)|> rename("weight_id" = "measurement_id"), by = "weight_id")

```


### Classify combined result

If one of them == missing --> missing
If one of them == exclude --> exclude
If one of them == duplicate --> duplicate
If one of them == corrected error --> corrected error
If one of them == include --> include

```{r}

data_height <- data_height |> 
  mutate(combined_result = case_when(manual_result == "Zero-or-negative-height" | manual_result == "Missing-height" ~ "Missing - Recording",
                                     manual_result == "Negative-age" | manual_result == "Missing-age" ~ "Missing - Age",
                                     manual_result == "Missing-sex" ~ "Missing - Sex",
                                     growthcleanr_result_combined == "Missing" ~ "Missing",
                                     growthcleanr_result_combined == "Exclude - Extreme-Outlier" | growthcleanr_result_combined == "Single-Outlier" ~ "Exclude - Single-Outlier",
                                     growthcleanr_result_combined == "Longitudinal-Outlier" ~ "Exclude - Longitudinal-Outlier",
                                     manual_result == "Exclude - Z-Score" ~ "Exclude - Z-Score",
                                     manual_result == "Carried-Forward" | growthcleanr_result_combined == "Carried-Forward" ~ "Carried-Forward",
                                     manual_result == "Same-Day" | growthcleanr_result_combined == "Same-Day" ~ "Same-Day",
                                     manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight" | growthcleanr_result_combined == "Swapped-Measurements" ~ "Include - Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight",
                                     manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low" | growthcleanr_result_combined == "Unit-Error" ~ "Include - Corrected-Unit-Error",
                                     manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High" ~ "Include - Corrected-Decimal-Error",
                                     manual_result == "Include" & growthcleanr_result_combined == "Include" ~ "Include - No-Error"))


data_height |> select(combined_result) |> tbl_summary()

```

```{r}


data_weight <- data_weight |> 
  mutate(combined_result = case_when(manual_result == "Zero-or-negative-weight" | manual_result == "Missing-weight" ~ "Missing - Recording",
                                     manual_result == "Negative-age" | manual_result == "Missing-age" ~ "Missing - Age",
                                     manual_result == "Missing-sex" ~ "Missing - Sex",
                                     growthcleanr_result_combined == "Missing" ~ "Missing",
                                     growthcleanr_result_combined == "Exclude - Extreme-Outlier" | growthcleanr_result_combined == "Single-Outlier" ~ "Exclude - Single-Outlier",
                                     growthcleanr_result_combined == "Longitudinal-Outlier" ~ "Exclude - Longitudinal-Outlier",
                                     manual_result == "Exclude - Z-Score" ~ "Exclude - Z-Score",
                                     manual_result == "Same-Day" | growthcleanr_result_combined == "Same-Day" ~ "Same-Day",
                                     manual_result == "Carried-Forward" | growthcleanr_result_combined == "Carried-Forward" ~ "Carried-Forward",
                                     manual_result ==  "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height" | growthcleanr_result_combined == "Swapped-Measurements" ~ "Include - Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height",
                                     manual_result == "Unit-Error-High" | manual_result == "Unit-Error-Low" ~ "Include - Corrected-Unit-Error",
                                     manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low1" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-Low2" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High1" | manual_result == "Decimal-Error-High2" ~ "Include - Corrected-Decimal-Error",
                                     manual_result == "Include" & growthcleanr_result_combined == "Include" ~ "Include - No-Error"))

data_weight |> select(combined_result) |> tbl_summary()

```

### Correct swapped height & weight


```{r}

data_height_original <- data_height

data_weight_original <- data_weight

```



```{r}

data_height_swapped <- data_height |> 
  filter(manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight")|>
  select(-c("date(height_datetime)", height_cm, original_height_cm, original_z_height, z_height_braegger)) |> 
  rename_with(~ gsub("height", "weight", .x), contains("height"))


data_weight_swapped <- data_weight |> 
  filter(manual_result == "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height")|>
  select(-c("date(weight_datetime)", weight_kg, original_weight_kg, original_z_weight, z_weight_braegger)) |> 
  rename_with(~ gsub("weight", "height", .x), contains("weight"))


data_height_clean <- data_height |> 
  filter(manual_result != "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight") |> 
  select(-c(weight_kg, z_weight_braegger)) |> 
  bind_rows(data_weight_swapped)

data_weight_clean <- data_weight |> 
  filter(manual_result != "Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height") |> 
  select(-c(height_cm, z_height_braegger)) |> 
  bind_rows(data_height_swapped)


```

## BMI algorithm

### Create BMI

To calculate BMI we take the weight measurements and try to find height measurements in close (time) relation to that weight.
If there was no same-day height for a weight measurement, we allowed to match the closest height within 30 days, as done in PEDSnet [Freedman et al.](https://doi.org/10.1111/ijpo.12889).
We choose height measurements in the following order: Included - No Error, Included, Duplicate, Excluded, Missing.

```{r}
data_height_for_bmi <- data_height_clean |> 
  mutate(height_quality_bmi = case_when(combined_result == "Include - No-Error" ~ "Include - No-Error",
                                        combined_result == "Include - Corrected-Unit-Error" | combined_result == "Include - Corrected-Decimal-Error" | combined_result == "Include - Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height" ~ "Include",
                                        combined_result == "Carried-Forward" | combined_result == "Same-Day" ~ "Duplicate",
                                        combined_result == "Exclude - Single-Outlier" | combined_result == "Exclude - Longitudinal-Outlier" | combined_result == "Exclude - Z-Score" ~ "Exclude",
                                        combined_result == "Missing - Recording" | combined_result == "Missing - Age" | combined_result == "Missing - Sex" ~ "Missing")) |> 
  mutate(height_quality_bmi = factor(height_quality_bmi,
                                     levels = c("Include - No-Error", "Include", "Duplicate", "Exclude", "Missing")))

data_height_for_bmi |> select(height_quality_bmi) |> tbl_summary()

```


```{r}

data_bmi <- data_weight_clean |> 
  rename("combined_result_weight" = "combined_result", "original_unit_weight" = "original_unit") |> 
  select(-c(manual_result, growthcleanr_result, growthcleanr_result_combined, gcr_result, gcr_result_combined)) |> 
  left_join(data_height_for_bmi |> 
              rename("combined_result_height" = "combined_result", "original_unit_height" = "original_unit") |> 
              select(participant_id, hospital, height_id, height_datetime, original_height, original_unit_height, height_cm, age_days_height, age_years_height, z_height_braegger, height_quality_bmi, combined_result_height), by = c("participant_id", "hospital"))

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  mutate(time_difference = as.numeric(difftime(height_datetime, weight_datetime, units = "days")))

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  group_by(weight_id) |> 
  filter(abs(time_difference)<=30) |> 
  arrange(abs(time_difference), .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  arrange(height_quality_bmi, .by_group = TRUE) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup()

```

Calculate BMI

```{r}

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  mutate(bmi = weight_kg/(height_cm/100)^2,
         age_days_bmi = age_days_weight,
         age_years_bmi = age_years_weight,
         bmi_datetime = weight_datetime)

```


### Calculate z-scores

BMI

```{r}
# calculate bmi z-score based on braegger reference ---------------------------

data_bmi <- data_bmi %>% 
  mutate(age_days_z = as.integer(case_when(age_days_bmi < 0 ~ NA,
                                age_days_bmi > 6575 ~ 6575,
                                TRUE ~ age_days_bmi)))

# add L,M,S values of bmi braegger reference to each individual
data_bmi <- left_join(x=data_bmi, y=interpolated_braegger_bmi, by = c('age_days_z' = "age_days",'sex'="sex"))

# calculate bmi z scores
data_bmi <- data_bmi %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(z_bmi_braegger=z_score_calc_corr(L,M,S,bmi)) |> 
  ungroup()

# delete LMS values
data_bmi = data_bmi %>% 
  select(-c("L", "M", "S"))

```

### Classify BMI result

```{r}

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  mutate(combined_result_bmi = case_when(combined_result_weight == "Missing - Recording" ~ "Missing Weight - Recording",
                                         combined_result_weight == "Missing - Age" ~ "Missing Weight - Age",
                                         combined_result_weight == "Missing - Sex" ~ "Missing Weight - Sex",
                                         combined_result_height == "Missing - Recording" ~ "Missing Height - Recording",
                                         combined_result_height == "Missing - Age" ~ "Missing Height - Age",
                                         combined_result_height == "Missing - Sex" ~ "Missing Height - Sex",
                                         combined_result_weight == "Exclude - Single-Outlier" ~ "Exclude Weight - Single-Outlier",
                                         combined_result_weight == "Exclude - Longitudinal-Outlier" ~ "Exclude Weight - Longitudinal-Outlier",
                                         combined_result_weight == "Exclude - Z-Score" ~ "Exclude Weight - Z-Score",
                                         combined_result_height == "Exclude - Single-Outlier" ~ "Exclude Height - Single-Outlier",
                                         combined_result_height == "Exclude - Longitudinal-Outlier" ~ "Exclude Height - Longitudinal-Outlier",
                                         combined_result_height == "Exclude - Z-Score" ~ "Exclude Height - Z-Score",
                                         z_bmi_braegger <(-5) | z_bmi_braegger >8 ~ "Exclude BMI - Z-Score",
                                         combined_result_weight == "Carried-Forward" ~ "Duplicate Weight - Carried-Forward",
                                         combined_result_weight == "Same-Day" ~ "Duplicate Weight - Same-Day",
                                         combined_result_height == "Carried-Forward" ~ "Duplicate Height - Carried-Forward",
                                         combined_result_height == "Same-Day" ~ "Duplicate Height - Same-Day",
                                         combined_result_weight == "Include - Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Weight" ~ "Include Weight - Corrected-Swapped-Measurements",
                                         combined_result_weight == "Include - Corrected-Unit-Error" ~ "Include Weight - Corrected-Unit-Error",
                                         combined_result_weight == "Include - Corrected-Decimal-Error" ~ "Include Weight - Corrected-Decimal-Error",
                                         combined_result_height == "Include - Swapped-Recoding-Include-as-Height" ~ "Include Height - Corrected-Swapped-Measurements",
                                         combined_result_height == "Include - Corrected-Unit-Error" ~ "Include Height - Corrected-Unit-Error",
                                         combined_result_height == "Include - Corrected-Decimal-Error" ~ "Include Height - Corrected-Decimal-Error",
                                         combined_result_weight == "Include - No-Error" & combined_result_height == "Include - No-Error" ~ "Include - No-Error"))

data_bmi |> select(combined_result_bmi) |> tbl_summary()


```


# Define inclusion criteria of SwissPedGrowth

Include participants who
- visited a hospital between 25.12.2016 and 07.01.2024 (adapted period for date shifts) based on Administrative Case AND
- were between 0 to 20 years old at visit based on Administrative Case admission

Exclude participants
- with refused GC
- missing birth date

Include data collected between 25.12.2016 and 07.01.2024 (adapted period for date shifts).

## Administrative data & Participants

Administrative Case:

```{r}

data_case <- data_case |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case = factor(case_when(case_admission_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - Case admission before 2017",
                                                          case_admission_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - Case admission after 2023",
                                                          is.na(age_years_case_admission) ~ "Exclude - missing age at case admission",
                                                          age_years_case_admission < 0 ~ "Exclude - <0 years at case admission",
                                                          age_years_case_admission >= 20 ~ "Exclude - >= 20 years at case admission",
                                                          TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                              levels = c("Include", "Exclude - Case admission before 2017", "Exclude - Case admission after 2023", "Exclude - missing age at case admission", "Exclude - <0 years at case admission", "Exclude - >= 20 years at case admission")))

data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) |> tbl_summary()

```

Participants:

```{r}

data_participant <- data_participant |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(participant_id, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) |> group_by(participant_id) |> arrange(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) |> slice(1) |> ungroup(), by = "participant_id", na_matches = "never")


data_participant <- data_participant |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case == "Include" ~ "Include",
                                                                 SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - no valid case",
                                                                 is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) ~ "Exclude - no case at all"),
                                                       levels = c("Include", "Exclude - no valid case", "Exclude - no case at all")))

data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant) |> tbl_summary()



```

Visits:

```{r}

data_visit_week <- data_visit_week |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_visit_week <- data_visit_week |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_visit_week <- data_visit_week |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                                SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                                visit_week_start_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - visit before 2017",
                                                                visit_week_start_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - visit after 2023",
                                                                is.na(age_years_visit_week_start) ~ "Exclude - missing age at visit",
                                                                age_years_visit_week_start < 0 ~ "Exclude - <0 years at visit",
                                                                age_years_visit_week_start >= 20 ~ "Exclude - >= 20 years at visit",
                                                                TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                      levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - visit before 2017", "Exclude - visit after 2023", "Exclude - missing age at visit", "Exclude - <0 years at visit", "Exclude - >= 20 years at visit")))

data_visit_week |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week) |> tbl_summary()



```

```{r}

data_visit_day <- data_visit_day |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_visit_day <- data_visit_day |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_visit_day <- data_visit_day |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                               SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                               visit_day_start_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - visit before 2017",
                                                               visit_day_start_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - visit after 2023",
                                                               is.na(age_years_visit_day_start) ~ "Exclude - missing age at visit",
                                                               age_years_visit_day_start < 0 ~ "Exclude - <0 years at visit",
                                                               age_years_visit_day_start >= 20 ~ "Exclude - >= 20 years at visit",
                                                               TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                     levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - visit before 2017", "Exclude - visit after 2023", "Exclude - missing age at visit", "Exclude - <0 years at visit", "Exclude - >= 20 years at visit")))

data_visit_day |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day) |> tbl_summary()
```

Encounter

```{r}

data_encounter <- data_encounter |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_encounter <- data_encounter |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_encounter <- data_encounter |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, visit_week_id), by = "visit_week_id", na_matches = "never")

data_encounter <- data_encounter |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, visit_day_id), by = "visit_day_id", na_matches = "never")

data_encounter <- data_encounter |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                               SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                               encounter_start_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - encounter before 2017",
                                                               encounter_start_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - encounter after 2023",
                                                               is.na(age_years_encounter_start) ~ "Exclude - missing age at encounter",
                                                               age_years_encounter_start < 0 ~ "Exclude - <0 years at encounter",
                                                               age_years_encounter_start >= 20 ~ "Exclude - >= 20 years at encounter",
                                                               TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                     levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - encounter before 2017", "Exclude - encounter after 2023", "Exclude - missing age at encounter", "Exclude - <0 years at encounter", "Exclude - >= 20 years at encounter")))

data_encounter |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter) |> tbl_summary()




```



## Clinical data
Billed Diagnosis

```{r}

data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(case_id)==FALSE ~ case_id,
                             is.na(case_id_encounter) == FALSE ~ case_id_encounter,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_day)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_day,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_week)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_week))

data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, visit_week_id), by = "visit_week_id", na_matches = "never")

data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, visit_day_id), by = "visit_day_id", na_matches = "never")

data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter, encounter_id), by = "encounter_id", na_matches = "never")


data_billed_diagnosis <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_diagnosis = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant) ~ "Exclude - no participant id",
                                                               SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) ~ "Exclude - no case id",
                                                               diagnosis_record_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - diagnosis before 2017",
                                                               diagnosis_record_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - diagnosis after 2023",
                                                               TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                     levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - no participant id", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - no case id", "Exclude - diagnosis before 2017", "Exclude - diagnosis after 2023")))

data_billed_diagnosis |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_diagnosis) |> tbl_summary()

```

Diagnosis

```{r}

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(case_id)==FALSE ~ case_id,
                             is.na(case_id_encounter) == FALSE ~ case_id_encounter,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_day)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_day,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_week)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_week))

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, visit_week_id), by = "visit_week_id", na_matches = "never")

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, visit_day_id), by = "visit_day_id", na_matches = "never")

data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter, encounter_id), by = "encounter_id", na_matches = "never")


data_diagnosis <- data_diagnosis |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_diagnosis = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant) ~ "Exclude - no participant id",
                                                               SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) ~ "Exclude - no case id",
                                                               diagnosis_record_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - diagnosis before 2017",
                                                               diagnosis_record_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - diagnosis after 2023",
                                                               TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                     levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - no participant id", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - no case id", "Exclude - diagnosis before 2017", "Exclude - diagnosis after 2023")))

data_diagnosis |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_diagnosis) |> tbl_summary()


```

Diagnoses combined

```{r}

data_diagnoses <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  bind_rows(data_diagnosis)


```


## Anthropometric data

Height 

```{r}

data_height_original <- data_height_original |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(case_id)==FALSE ~ case_id,
                             is.na(case_id_encounter) == FALSE ~ case_id_encounter,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_day)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_day,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_week)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_week))

data_height_original <- data_height_original |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_height_original <- data_height_original |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_height_original <- data_height_original |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, visit_week_id), by = "visit_week_id", na_matches = "never")

data_height_original <- data_height_original |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, visit_day_id), by = "visit_day_id", na_matches = "never")

data_height_original <- data_height_original |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter, encounter_id), by = "encounter_id", na_matches = "never")


data_height_original <- data_height_original |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_height = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant) ~ "Exclude - no participant id",
                                                               SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) ~ "Exclude - no case id",
                                                               height_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - height before 2017",
                                                               height_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - height after 2023",
                                                               TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                     levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - no participant id", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - no case id", "Exclude - height before 2017", "Exclude - height after 2023")))

data_height_original |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_height) |> tbl_summary()




data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(case_id)==FALSE ~ case_id,
                             is.na(case_id_encounter) == FALSE ~ case_id_encounter,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_day)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_day,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_week)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_week))

data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, visit_week_id), by = "visit_week_id", na_matches = "never")

data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, visit_day_id), by = "visit_day_id", na_matches = "never")

data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter, encounter_id), by = "encounter_id", na_matches = "never")


data_height_clean <- data_height_clean |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_height = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant) ~ "Exclude - no participant id",
                                                               SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) ~ "Exclude - no case id",
                                                               height_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - height before 2017",
                                                               height_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - height after 2023",
                                                               TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                     levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - no participant id", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - no case id", "Exclude - height before 2017", "Exclude - height after 2023")))

data_height_clean |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_height) |> tbl_summary()



```

Weight 

```{r}

data_weight_original <- data_weight_original |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(case_id)==FALSE ~ case_id,
                             is.na(case_id_encounter) == FALSE ~ case_id_encounter,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_day)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_day,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_week)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_week))

data_weight_original <- data_weight_original |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_weight_original <- data_weight_original |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_weight_original <- data_weight_original |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, visit_week_id), by = "visit_week_id", na_matches = "never")

data_weight_original <- data_weight_original |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, visit_day_id), by = "visit_day_id", na_matches = "never")

data_weight_original <- data_weight_original |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter, encounter_id), by = "encounter_id", na_matches = "never")


data_weight_original <- data_weight_original |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_weight = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant) ~ "Exclude - no participant id",
                                                               SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) ~ "Exclude - no case id",
                                                               weight_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - weight before 2017",
                                                               weight_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - weight after 2023",
                                                               TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                     levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - no participant id", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - no case id", "Exclude - weight before 2017", "Exclude - weight after 2023")))

data_weight_original |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_weight) |> tbl_summary()




data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(case_id)==FALSE ~ case_id,
                             is.na(case_id_encounter) == FALSE ~ case_id_encounter,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_day)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_day,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_week)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_week))

data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, visit_week_id), by = "visit_week_id", na_matches = "never")

data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, visit_day_id), by = "visit_day_id", na_matches = "never")

data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter, encounter_id), by = "encounter_id", na_matches = "never")


data_weight_clean <- data_weight_clean |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_weight = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant) ~ "Exclude - no participant id",
                                                               SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) ~ "Exclude - no case id",
                                                               weight_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - weight before 2017",
                                                               weight_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - weight after 2023",
                                                               TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                     levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - no participant id", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - no case id", "Exclude - weight before 2017", "Exclude - weight after 2023")))

data_weight_clean |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_weight) |> tbl_summary()



```


BMI

```{r}

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(case_id)==FALSE ~ case_id,
                             is.na(case_id_encounter) == FALSE ~ case_id_encounter,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_day)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_day,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_week)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_week))

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, visit_week_id), by = "visit_week_id", na_matches = "never")

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, visit_day_id), by = "visit_day_id", na_matches = "never")

data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter, encounter_id), by = "encounter_id", na_matches = "never")


data_bmi <- data_bmi |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_bmi = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant) ~ "Exclude - no participant id",
                                                               SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) ~ "Exclude - no case id",
                                                               bmi_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - bmi before 2017",
                                                               bmi_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - bmi after 2023",
                                                               TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                     levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - no participant id", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - no case id", "Exclude - bmi before 2017", "Exclude - bmi after 2023")))

data_bmi |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_bmi) |> tbl_summary()


```




Circumference

```{r}

data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(case_id)==FALSE ~ case_id,
                             is.na(case_id_encounter) == FALSE ~ case_id_encounter,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_day)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_day,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_week)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_week))

data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, visit_week_id), by = "visit_week_id", na_matches = "never")

data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, visit_day_id), by = "visit_day_id", na_matches = "never")

data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter, encounter_id), by = "encounter_id", na_matches = "never")


data_circumference <- data_circumference |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant) ~ "Exclude - no participant id",
                                                               SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) ~ "Exclude - no case id",
                                                               circumference_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - circumference before 2017",
                                                               circumference_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - circumference after 2023",
                                                               TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                     levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - no participant id", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - no case id", "Exclude - circumference before 2017", "Exclude - circumference after 2023")))

data_circumference |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference) |> tbl_summary()

```



Head circumference

```{r}

data_head <- data_head |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(case_id)==FALSE ~ case_id,
                             is.na(case_id_encounter) == FALSE ~ case_id_encounter,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_day)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_day,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_week)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_week))

data_head <- data_head |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_head <- data_head |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_head <- data_head |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, visit_week_id), by = "visit_week_id", na_matches = "never")

data_head <- data_head |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, visit_day_id), by = "visit_day_id", na_matches = "never")

data_head <- data_head |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter, encounter_id), by = "encounter_id", na_matches = "never")


data_head <- data_head |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant) ~ "Exclude - no participant id",
                                                               SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) ~ "Exclude - no case id",
                                                               circumference_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - circumference before 2017",
                                                               circumference_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - circumference after 2023",
                                                               TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                     levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - no participant id", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - no case id", "Exclude - circumference before 2017", "Exclude - circumference after 2023")))

data_head |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference) |> tbl_summary()


```


Other circumferences

```{r}


data_neck <- data_neck |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(case_id)==FALSE ~ case_id,
                             is.na(case_id_encounter) == FALSE ~ case_id_encounter,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_day)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_day,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_week)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_week))

data_neck <- data_neck |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_neck <- data_neck |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_neck <- data_neck |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, visit_week_id), by = "visit_week_id", na_matches = "never")

data_neck <- data_neck |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, visit_day_id), by = "visit_day_id", na_matches = "never")

data_neck <- data_neck |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter, encounter_id), by = "encounter_id", na_matches = "never")


data_neck <- data_neck |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant) ~ "Exclude - no participant id",
                                                               SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) ~ "Exclude - no case id",
                                                               circumference_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - circumference before 2017",
                                                               circumference_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - circumference after 2023",
                                                               TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                     levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - no participant id", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - no case id", "Exclude - circumference before 2017", "Exclude - circumference after 2023")))

data_neck |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference) |> tbl_summary()




data_hip <- data_hip |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(case_id)==FALSE ~ case_id,
                             is.na(case_id_encounter) == FALSE ~ case_id_encounter,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_day)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_day,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_week)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_week))

data_hip <- data_hip |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_hip <- data_hip |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_hip <- data_hip |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, visit_week_id), by = "visit_week_id", na_matches = "never")

data_hip <- data_hip |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, visit_day_id), by = "visit_day_id", na_matches = "never")

data_hip <- data_hip |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter, encounter_id), by = "encounter_id", na_matches = "never")


data_hip <- data_hip |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant) ~ "Exclude - no participant id",
                                                               SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) ~ "Exclude - no case id",
                                                               circumference_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - circumference before 2017",
                                                               circumference_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - circumference after 2023",
                                                               TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                     levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - no participant id", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - no case id", "Exclude - circumference before 2017", "Exclude - circumference after 2023")))

data_hip |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference) |> tbl_summary()



data_waist <- data_waist |> 
  mutate(case_id = case_when(is.na(case_id)==FALSE ~ case_id,
                             is.na(case_id_encounter) == FALSE ~ case_id_encounter,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_day)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_day,
                             is.na(case_id_visit_week)==FALSE ~ case_id_visit_week))

data_waist <- data_waist |> 
  left_join(data_participant |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant, participant_id), by = "participant_id")

data_waist <- data_waist |> 
  left_join(data_case |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case, case_id), by = "case_id", na_matches = "never")

data_waist <- data_waist |> 
  left_join(data_visit_week |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, visit_week_id), by = "visit_week_id", na_matches = "never")

data_waist <- data_waist |> 
  left_join(data_visit_day |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, visit_day_id), by = "visit_day_id", na_matches = "never")

data_waist <- data_waist |> 
  left_join(data_encounter |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter, encounter_id), by = "encounter_id", na_matches = "never")


data_waist <- data_waist |> 
  mutate(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference = factor(case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant != "Include" ~ "Exclude - participant",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant) ~ "Exclude - no participant id",
                                                               SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case != "Include" ~ "Exclude - case",
                                                               is.na(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case) ~ "Exclude - no case id",
                                                               circumference_datetime < ymd("2016-12-25") ~ "Exclude - circumference before 2017",
                                                               circumference_datetime > ymd("2024-01-07") ~ "Exclude - circumference after 2023",
                                                               TRUE ~ "Include"),
                                                     levels = c("Include", "Exclude - participant", "Exclude - no participant id", "Exclude - case", "Exclude - no case id", "Exclude - circumference before 2017", "Exclude - circumference after 2023")))

data_waist |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference) |> tbl_summary()


```


## Apply inclusion criteria

Participant

```{r}

data_participant_included <- data_participant |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_participant == "Include") |> 
  select(-c(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case))


```

Case

```{r}

data_case_included <- data_case |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_case == "Include")


```


Visits:

```{r}

data_visit_week_included <- data_visit_week |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week == "Include")


data_visit_day_included <- data_visit_day |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day == "Include")


```


Encounter

```{r}


data_encounter_included <- data_encounter |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter == "Include")


```


Billed diagnosis

```{r}

data_billed_diagnosis_included <- data_billed_diagnosis |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_diagnosis == "Include")

data_billed_diagnosis_included |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter) |> tbl_summary()

data_billed_diagnosis_included <- data_billed_diagnosis_included |> 
  mutate(case_id_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_week),
         age_years_visit_week_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_end),
         visit_week_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_id),
         visit_week_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_end_datetime),
         visit_week_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_type),
         visit_week_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week),
         case_id_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_day),
         age_years_visit_day_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_end),
         visit_day_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_id),
         visit_day_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_end_datetime),
         visit_day_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_type),
         visit_day_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day),
         case_id_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ case_id_encounter),
         age_days_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_start),
         age_years_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_start),
         age_days_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_end),
         age_years_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_end),
         encounter_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_id),
         encounter_specialty = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_specialty),
         encounter_origin_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_name),
         encounter_origin_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_code),
         encounter_current_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_name),
         encounter_current_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_code),
         encounter_target_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_name),
         encounter_target_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_code),
         encounter_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_start_datetime),
         encounter_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_end_datetime),
         encounter_duration_minutes = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_minutes),
         encounter_duration_hours = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_hours),
         encounter_duration_days = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_days),
         encounter_carehandling = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_carehandling),
         encounter_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
```
