```{r}
                                  TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter))


```


Diagnosis

```{r}

data_diagnosis_included <- data_diagnosis |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_diagnosis == "Include")

data_diagnosis_included |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter) |> tbl_summary()

data_diagnosis_included <- data_diagnosis_included |> 
  mutate(case_id_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_week),
         age_years_visit_week_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_end),
         visit_week_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_id),
         visit_week_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_end_datetime),
         visit_week_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_type),
         visit_week_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week),
         case_id_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_day),
         age_years_visit_day_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_end),
         visit_day_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_id),
         visit_day_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_end_datetime),
         visit_day_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_type),
         visit_day_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day),
         case_id_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ case_id_encounter),
         age_days_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_start),
         age_years_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_start),
         age_days_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_end),
         age_years_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_end),
         encounter_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_id),
         encounter_specialty = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_specialty),
         encounter_origin_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_name),
         encounter_origin_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_code),
         encounter_current_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_name),
         encounter_current_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_code),
         encounter_target_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_name),
         encounter_target_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_code),
         encounter_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_start_datetime),
         encounter_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_end_datetime),
         encounter_duration_minutes = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_minutes),
         encounter_duration_hours = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_hours),
         encounter_duration_days = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_days),
         encounter_carehandling = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_carehandling),
         encounter_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter))


```


Diagnoses

```{r}

data_diagnoses_included <- data_billed_diagnosis_included |> 
  bind_rows(data_diagnosis_included)


```


Height

```{r}

data_height_original_included <- data_height_original |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_height == "Include")

data_height_original_included |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter) |> tbl_summary()

data_height_original_included <- data_height_original_included |> 
  mutate(case_id_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_week),
         age_years_visit_week_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_end),
         visit_week_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_id),
         visit_week_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_end_datetime),
         visit_week_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_type),
         visit_week_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week),
         case_id_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_day),
         age_years_visit_day_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_end),
         visit_day_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_id),
         visit_day_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_end_datetime),
         visit_day_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_type),
         visit_day_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day),
         case_id_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ case_id_encounter),
         age_days_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_start),
         age_years_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_start),
         age_days_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_end),
         age_years_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_end),
         encounter_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_id),
         encounter_specialty = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_specialty),
         encounter_origin_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_name),
         encounter_origin_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_code),
         encounter_current_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_name),
         encounter_current_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_code),
         encounter_target_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_name),
         encounter_target_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_code),
         encounter_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_start_datetime),
         encounter_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_end_datetime),
         encounter_duration_minutes = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_minutes),
         encounter_duration_hours = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_hours),
         encounter_duration_days = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_days),
         encounter_carehandling = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_carehandling),
         encounter_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter))



data_height_clean_included <- data_height_clean |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_height == "Include")

data_height_clean_included |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter) |> tbl_summary()

data_height_clean_included <- data_height_clean_included |> 
  mutate(case_id_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_week),
         age_years_visit_week_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_end),
         visit_week_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_id),
         visit_week_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_end_datetime),
         visit_week_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_type),
         visit_week_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week),
         case_id_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_day),
         age_years_visit_day_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_end),
         visit_day_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_id),
         visit_day_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_end_datetime),
         visit_day_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_type),
         visit_day_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day),
         case_id_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ case_id_encounter),
         age_days_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_start),
         age_years_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_start),
         age_days_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_end),
         age_years_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_end),
         encounter_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_id),
         encounter_specialty = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_specialty),
         encounter_origin_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_name),
         encounter_origin_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_code),
         encounter_current_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_name),
         encounter_current_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_code),
         encounter_target_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_name),
         encounter_target_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_code),
         encounter_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_start_datetime),
         encounter_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_end_datetime),
         encounter_duration_minutes = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_minutes),
         encounter_duration_hours = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_hours),
         encounter_duration_days = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_days),
         encounter_carehandling = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_carehandling),
         encounter_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter))


```


Weight

```{r}

data_weight_original_included <- data_weight_original |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_weight == "Include")

data_weight_original_included |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter) |> tbl_summary()

data_weight_original_included <- data_weight_original_included |> 
  mutate(case_id_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_week),
         age_years_visit_week_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_end),
         visit_week_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_id),
         visit_week_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_end_datetime),
         visit_week_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_type),
         visit_week_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week),
         case_id_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_day),
         age_years_visit_day_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_end),
         visit_day_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_id),
         visit_day_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_end_datetime),
         visit_day_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_type),
         visit_day_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day),
         case_id_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ case_id_encounter),
         age_days_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_start),
         age_years_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_start),
         age_days_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_end),
         age_years_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_end),
         encounter_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_id),
         encounter_specialty = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_specialty),
         encounter_origin_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_name),
         encounter_origin_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_code),
         encounter_current_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_name),
         encounter_current_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_code),
         encounter_target_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_name),
         encounter_target_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_code),
         encounter_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_start_datetime),
         encounter_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_end_datetime),
         encounter_duration_minutes = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_minutes),
         encounter_duration_hours = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_hours),
         encounter_duration_days = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_days),
         encounter_carehandling = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_carehandling),
         encounter_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter))



data_weight_clean_included <- data_weight_clean |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_weight == "Include")

data_weight_clean_included |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter) |> tbl_summary()

data_weight_clean_included <- data_weight_clean_included |> 
  mutate(case_id_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_week),
         age_years_visit_week_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_end),
         visit_week_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_id),
         visit_week_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_end_datetime),
         visit_week_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_type),
         visit_week_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week),
         case_id_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_day),
         age_years_visit_day_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_end),
         visit_day_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_id),
         visit_day_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_end_datetime),
         visit_day_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_type),
         visit_day_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day),
         case_id_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ case_id_encounter),
         age_days_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_start),
         age_years_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_start),
         age_days_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_end),
         age_years_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_end),
         encounter_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_id),
         encounter_specialty = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_specialty),
         encounter_origin_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_name),
         encounter_origin_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_code),
         encounter_current_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_name),
         encounter_current_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_code),
         encounter_target_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_name),
         encounter_target_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_code),
         encounter_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_start_datetime),
         encounter_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_end_datetime),
         encounter_duration_minutes = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_minutes),
         encounter_duration_hours = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_hours),
         encounter_duration_days = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_days),
         encounter_carehandling = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_carehandling),
         encounter_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter))


```


BMI 

```{r}

data_bmi_included <- data_bmi |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_bmi == "Include")

data_bmi_included |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter) |> tbl_summary()

data_bmi_included <- data_bmi_included |> 
  mutate(case_id_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_week),
         age_years_visit_week_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_end),
         visit_week_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_id),
         visit_week_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_end_datetime),
         visit_week_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_type),
         visit_week_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week),
         case_id_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_day),
         age_years_visit_day_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_end),
         visit_day_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_id),
         visit_day_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_end_datetime),
         visit_day_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_type),
         visit_day_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day),
         case_id_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ case_id_encounter),
         age_days_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_start),
         age_years_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_start),
         age_days_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_end),
         age_years_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_end),
         encounter_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_id),
         encounter_specialty = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_specialty),
         encounter_origin_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_name),
         encounter_origin_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_code),
         encounter_current_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_name),
         encounter_current_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_code),
         encounter_target_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_name),
         encounter_target_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_code),
         encounter_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_start_datetime),
         encounter_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_end_datetime),
         encounter_duration_minutes = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_minutes),
         encounter_duration_hours = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_hours),
         encounter_duration_days = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_days),
         encounter_carehandling = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_carehandling),
         encounter_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter))


```


Circumference 

```{r}

data_circumference_included <- data_circumference |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference == "Include")

data_circumference_included |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter) |> tbl_summary()

data_circumference_included <- data_circumference_included |> 
  mutate(case_id_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_week),
         age_years_visit_week_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_end),
         visit_week_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_id),
         visit_week_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_end_datetime),
         visit_week_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_type),
         visit_week_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week),
         case_id_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_day),
         age_years_visit_day_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_end),
         visit_day_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_id),
         visit_day_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_end_datetime),
         visit_day_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_type),
         visit_day_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day),
         case_id_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ case_id_encounter),
         age_days_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_start),
         age_years_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_start),
         age_days_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_end),
         age_years_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_end),
         encounter_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_id),
         encounter_specialty = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_specialty),
         encounter_origin_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_name),
         encounter_origin_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_code),
         encounter_current_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_name),
         encounter_current_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_code),
         encounter_target_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_name),
         encounter_target_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_code),
         encounter_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_start_datetime),
         encounter_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_end_datetime),
         encounter_duration_minutes = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_minutes),
         encounter_duration_hours = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_hours),
         encounter_duration_days = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_days),
         encounter_carehandling = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_carehandling),
         encounter_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter))


```


Head circumference 

```{r}

data_head_included <- data_head |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference == "Include")

data_head_included |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter) |> tbl_summary()

data_head_included <- data_head_included |> 
  mutate(case_id_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_week),
         age_years_visit_week_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_end),
         visit_week_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_id),
         visit_week_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_end_datetime),
         visit_week_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_type),
         visit_week_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week),
         case_id_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_day),
         age_years_visit_day_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_end),
         visit_day_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_id),
         visit_day_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_end_datetime),
         visit_day_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_type),
         visit_day_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day),
         case_id_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ case_id_encounter),
         age_days_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_start),
         age_years_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_start),
         age_days_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_end),
         age_years_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_end),
         encounter_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_id),
         encounter_specialty = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_specialty),
         encounter_origin_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_name),
         encounter_origin_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_code),
         encounter_current_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_name),
         encounter_current_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_code),
         encounter_target_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_name),
         encounter_target_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_code),
         encounter_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_start_datetime),
         encounter_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_end_datetime),
         encounter_duration_minutes = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_minutes),
         encounter_duration_hours = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_hours),
         encounter_duration_days = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_days),
         encounter_carehandling = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_carehandling),
         encounter_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter))


```


Neck 

```{r}

data_neck_included <- data_neck |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference == "Include")

data_neck_included |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter) |> tbl_summary()

data_neck_included <- data_neck_included |> 
  mutate(case_id_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_week),
         age_years_visit_week_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_end),
         visit_week_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_id),
         visit_week_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_end_datetime),
         visit_week_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_type),
         visit_week_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week),
         case_id_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_day),
         age_years_visit_day_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_end),
         visit_day_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_id),
         visit_day_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_end_datetime),
         visit_day_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_type),
         visit_day_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day),
         case_id_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ case_id_encounter),
         age_days_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_start),
         age_years_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_start),
         age_days_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_end),
         age_years_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_end),
         encounter_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_id),
         encounter_specialty = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_specialty),
         encounter_origin_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_name),
         encounter_origin_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_code),
         encounter_current_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_name),
         encounter_current_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_code),
         encounter_target_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_name),
         encounter_target_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_code),
         encounter_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_start_datetime),
         encounter_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_end_datetime),
         encounter_duration_minutes = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_minutes),
         encounter_duration_hours = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_hours),
         encounter_duration_days = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_days),
         encounter_carehandling = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_carehandling),
         encounter_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter))


```


Hip 

```{r}

data_hip_included <- data_hip |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference == "Include")

data_hip_included |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter) |> tbl_summary()

data_hip_included <- data_hip_included |> 
  mutate(case_id_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_week),
         age_years_visit_week_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_end),
         visit_week_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_id),
         visit_week_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_end_datetime),
         visit_week_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_type),
         visit_week_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week),
         case_id_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_day),
         age_years_visit_day_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_end),
         visit_day_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_id),
         visit_day_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_end_datetime),
         visit_day_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_type),
         visit_day_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day),
         case_id_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ case_id_encounter),
         age_days_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_start),
         age_years_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_start),
         age_days_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_end),
         age_years_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_end),
         encounter_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_id),
         encounter_specialty = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_specialty),
         encounter_origin_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_name),
         encounter_origin_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_code),
         encounter_current_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_name),
         encounter_current_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_code),
         encounter_target_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_name),
         encounter_target_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_code),
         encounter_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_start_datetime),
         encounter_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_end_datetime),
         encounter_duration_minutes = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_minutes),
         encounter_duration_hours = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_hours),
         encounter_duration_days = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_days),
         encounter_carehandling = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_carehandling),
         encounter_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter))


```


Waist 

```{r}

data_waist_included <- data_waist |> 
  filter(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_circumference == "Include")

data_waist_included |> select(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day, SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter) |> tbl_summary()

data_waist_included <- data_waist_included |> 
  mutate(case_id_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_week),
         age_years_visit_week_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_start),
         age_years_visit_week_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_week_end),
         visit_week_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_id),
         visit_week_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_start_datetime),
         visit_week_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_end_datetime),
         visit_week_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_type),
         visit_week_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_week_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_week),
         case_id_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ case_id_visit_day),
         age_years_visit_day_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_start),
         age_years_visit_day_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ age_years_visit_day_end),
         visit_day_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_id),
         visit_day_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_start_datetime),
         visit_day_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_end_datetime),
         visit_day_type = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_type),
         visit_day_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                   TRUE ~ visit_day_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day != "Include" ~ NA,
                                                         TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_visit_day),
         case_id_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ case_id_encounter),
         age_days_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_start),
         age_years_encounter_start = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_start),
         age_days_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_days_encounter_end),
         age_years_encounter_end = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ age_years_encounter_end),
         encounter_id = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_id),
         encounter_specialty = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_specialty),
         encounter_origin_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_name),
         encounter_origin_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_origin_location_code),
         encounter_current_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_name),
         encounter_current_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_current_location_code),
         encounter_target_location_name = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_name),
         encounter_target_location_code = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_target_location_code),
         encounter_start_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_start_datetime),
         encounter_end_datetime = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_end_datetime),
         encounter_duration_minutes = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_minutes),
         encounter_duration_hours = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_hours),
         encounter_duration_days = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_duration_days),
         encounter_carehandling = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_carehandling),
         encounter_link_quality = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ encounter_link_quality),
         SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter = case_when(SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter != "Include" ~ NA,
                                  TRUE ~ SwissPedGrowth_inclusion_encounter))


```


# Save clean data

Full data

```{r}

# administrative
save(data_participant, file = here("data","processed", "Full", "data_participant.RData"))
save(data_case, file = here("data", "processed", "Full", "data_case.RData"))
save(data_visit_day, file = here("data", "processed", "Full", "data_visit_day.RData"))
save(data_visit_week, file = here("data", "processed", "Full", "data_visit_week.RData"))
save(data_encounter, file = here("data", "processed", "Full", "data_encounter.RData"))

# clinical
save(data_billed_diagnosis, file = here("data","processed", "Full", "data_billed_diagnosis.RData"))
save(data_diagnosis, file = here("data","processed", "Full", "data_diagnosis.RData"))
save(data_diagnoses, file = here("data","processed", "Full", "data_diagnoses.RData"))

# anthropometrics
save(data_height_original, file = here("data","processed", "Full", "data_height_original.RData"))
save(data_weight_original, file = here("data","processed", "Full", "data_weight_original.RData"))
save(data_height_clean, file = here("data","processed", "Full", "data_height_clean.RData"))
save(data_weight_clean, file = here("data","processed", "Full", "data_weight_clean.RData"))
save(data_bmi, file = here("data", "processed", "Full", "data_bmi.RData"))
save(data_circumference, file = here("data","processed", "Full", "data_circumference.RData"))
save(data_head, file = here("data","processed", "Full", "data_head.RData"))
save(data_waist, file = here("data","processed", "Full", "data_waist.RData"))
save(data_hip, file = here("data","processed", "Full", "data_hip.RData"))
save(data_neck, file = here("data","processed", "Full", "data_neck.RData"))

```


Included data


```{r}

# administrative
save(data_participant_included, file = here("data","processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_participant.RData"))
save(data_case_included, file = here("data", "processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_case.RData"))
save(data_visit_day_included, file = here("data", "processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_visit_day.RData"))
save(data_visit_week_included, file = here("data", "processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_visit_week.RData"))
save(data_encounter_included, file = here("data", "processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_encounter.RData"))

# clinical
save(data_billed_diagnosis_included, file = here("data","processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_billed_diagnosis.RData"))
save(data_diagnosis_included, file = here("data","processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_diagnosis.RData"))
save(data_diagnoses_included, file = here("data","processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_diagnoses.RData"))

# anthropometrics
save(data_height_original_included, file = here("data","processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_height_original.RData"))
save(data_weight_original_included, file = here("data","processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_weight_original.RData"))
save(data_height_clean_included, file = here("data","processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_height_clean.RData"))
save(data_weight_clean_included, file = here("data","processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_weight_clean.RData"))
save(data_bmi_included, file = here("data", "processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_bmi.RData"))
save(data_circumference_included, file = here("data","processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_circumference.RData"))
save(data_head_included, file = here("data","processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_head.RData"))
save(data_waist_included, file = here("data","processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_waist.RData"))
save(data_hip_included, file = here("data","processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_hip.RData"))
save(data_neck_included, file = here("data","processed", "SwissPedGrowth_included", "data_neck.RData"))

```
